figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Spectra of REBELS-25 showing the detected line emission of CO(3–2) ( top panel ) and CO(7–6) together with the undetected [C i ](2–1) emission ( bottom panel ). In each panel, we show the data presented in this paper as an aqua histogram and the respective ± 1 ​ σ \pm 1\sigma as a grey shaded area. We also display a comparison with the [C ii ] spectrum which is detected at high S/N in this source (yellow hatched histogram), rescaled to match the amplitude of the CO emission. Vertical dash-dotted lines and shaded areas show the expected frequency and ± 1 × \pm 1\times FWHM [ C ​ ii ] {}_{\rm{[C\,\textsc{ii}]}} region of each line based on the [C ii ]-based redshift of the source. Red lines show the best-fit Gaussian to the CO line when leaving all parameters free, while orange lines show the best-fit to the [C ii ] data rescaled to the amplitude of the CO emission. In the top panel, there are some gaps in the CO(3–2) data due to fully flagged channels at the edge of spectral windows.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：REBELS-25的光谱，显示探测到的CO(3–2)（上图）和CO(7–6)以及未探测到的[C i](2–1)发射（下图）。在每个面板中，我们以浅蓝色直方图显示本文呈现的数据，并以灰色阴影区域显示相应的±1σ。我们还展示了与[C ii]光谱的比较，该光谱在该源中以高信噪比探测到（黄色阴影直方图），已重新缩放以匹配CO发射的振幅。垂直点划线及阴影区域显示了基于源[C ii]红移的每条线的预期频率和±1×FWHM_[C ii]区域。红线显示当所有参数自由时CO线的最佳拟合高斯，而橙线显示重新缩放至CO发射振幅的[C ii]数据的最佳拟合。在上图中，由于光谱窗口边缘的完全标记通道，CO(3–2)数据中存在一些间隙。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Black contours ( [ − 3 , − 2 , 2 , 3 ] ​ σ [-3,-2,2,3]\sigma ) show the velocity-integrated emission of CO(3–2) ( left panel ) and of CO(7–6) ( right panel ) overlaid on the [C ii ] moment 0 map obtained from the REBELS large program data. We also show the contours for the [C ii ] emission (white, [ − 3 , − 2 , 2 , 3 , 5 , 12 ] ​ σ [-3,-2,2,3,5,12]\sigma ) and ALMA band 6 continuum tracing the dust emission (orange, [ − 3 , − 2 , 2 , 3 , 5 ] ​ σ [-3,-2,2,3,5]\sigma ). Synthesized beams for each dataset are shown as ellipses of the corresponding colour in the bottom left corner of the plot. The positions of the peak of the detected CO lines are consistent with the known position of the source.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：黑色等值线（[-3,-2,2,3]σ）显示CO(3–2)（左图）和CO(7–6)（右图）的速度积分发射，叠加在从REBELS大型计划数据获得的[C ii]矩0图上。我们还显示了[C ii]发射（白色，[-3,-2,2,3,5,12]σ）和追踪尘埃发射的ALMA波段6连续谱（橙色，[-3,-2,2,3,5]σ）的等值线。每个数据集的合成波束在图的左下角以相应颜色的椭圆显示。探测到的CO线峰值位置与已知的源位置一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Molecular gas depletion timescale as a function of redshift for galaxies across cosmic time (adapted from Zavala et al. , 2022 ) . The large symbols mark the values derived for REBELS-25, assuming the CMB-corrected CO luminosity and α CO = 3 \alpha_{\rm CO}=3 and 1 (magenta and aqua star, respectively); for clarity, the aqua star has been slightly offset in redshift to avoid overlapping error bars. Both values are broadly consistent with the extrapolation to z ∼ 7 z\sim 7 of the best-fit relation for main-sequence (MS) galaxies from Tacconi et al. ( 2020 ) (solid purple line). The dashed maroon line represents the corresponding fit from the same study for starburst (SB) galaxies. Blue and red circles indicate the individual sources in their respective MS and SB samples. The dash-dotted line shows the relation from Sommovigo et al. ( 2022b , a ) based on the evolution of mean baryonic accretion rates onto dark matter halos in dark-matter–only simulations. The hatched gray boxes mark the typical range of values derived for MS galaxies at z ∼ 4 − 6 z\sim 4-6 from [C ii ]-based gas masses in the ALPINE survey (Dessauges-Zavadsky et al. , 2020 ) , while the black ones mark the range of values derived from [C ii ]-based gas masses for the REBELS sample (Aravena et al. , 2024 ) . Additional high-redshift measurements from the literature are shown for comparison: the orange circle represents the lensed MS galaxy studied in Zavala et al. ( 2022 ) , the yellow hexagon represents HZ10 from Pavesi et al. ( 2019 ) , and green open triangles indicate SPT-selected DSFGs from Aravena et al. ( 2016 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：宇宙时间中星系分子气体消耗时标随红移的变化（改编自Zavala等人，2022）。大符号标记了REBELS-25推导的值，假设经过CMB修正的CO光度和α_CO=3（洋红色星）和1（浅蓝色星）；为清晰起见，浅蓝色星在红移上略有偏移以避免误差棒重叠。两个值与Tacconi等人（2020）对主序星系最佳拟合关系外推到z~7（实紫线）大致一致。虚线栗色线表示同一研究对星暴星系的相应拟合。蓝色和红色圆圈分别表示其主序和星暴样本中的个别源。点划线表示Sommovigo等人（2022b, a）基于暗物质仅模拟中暗物质晕平均重子吸积率演化的关系。阴影灰色框标记了ALPINE巡测中基于[C ii]气体质量在z~4-6主序星系的典型值范围（Dessauges-Zavadsky等人，2020），而黑色框标记了REBELS样本中基于[C ii]气体质量的值范围（Aravena等人，2024）。文献中的其他高红移测量值也显示用于比较：橙色圆圈代表Zavala等人（2022）研究的透镜主序星系，黄色六边形代表Pavesi等人（2019）的HZ10，绿色空心三角形代表Aravena等人（2016）的SPT选择DSFG。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Dust spectral energy distribution (SED; left panel ) and CO spectral line energy distribution (SLED; right panel ) of REBELS-25 derived by fitting the observed continuum and line fluxes (black points for detections, arrows for 1 ​ σ 1\sigma upper limits) self-consistently with the TUNER model. The black dashed lines represent the best-fit median model to the data given the priors, while the gray shaded regions show the 16th–84th percentile ranges. Coloured dotted lines represent the contribution of a few individual molecular gas density components, as described in the legend (and scaled up for visibility). The CO SLED in the model peaks around J ≃ 5 J\simeq 5 , consistent with moderately excited molecular gas conditions.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：REBELS-25的尘埃光谱能量分布（左图）和CO谱线能量分布（右图），通过使用TUNER模型自洽拟合观测到的连续谱和线通量（黑色点表示探测，箭头表示1σ上限）得出。黑色虚线表示给定先验下数据的最佳拟合中值模型，而灰色阴影区域显示第16-84百分位范围。彩色虚线表示几个个别分子气体密度成分的贡献，如图例所述（并缩放以提高可见性）。模型中的CO谱线能量分布在J≃5附近达到峰值，与中等激发的分子气体条件一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Evolution of the [C ii ]-to-H 2 conversion factor ( α [ C ​ ii ] \alpha_{\rm[C\,\textsc{ii}]} ) as a function of redshift. We include measurements drawn from the literature for main-sequence galaxies (MS), starburst galaxies (SB) and Lymann break analogues (LBA) (Stacey et al. , 1991 ; Ferkinhoff et al. , 2014 ; Huynh et al. , 2014 ; Magdis et al. , 2014 ; Capak et al. , 2015 ; Cormier et al. , 2015 ; Gullberg et al. , 2015 ; Schaerer et al. , 2015 ; Madden et al. , 2016 ; Accurso et al. , 2017 ; Contursi et al. , 2017 ; Hughes et al. , 2017 ; Zanella et al. , 2018 ; Rizzo et al. , 2020 , 2021 ) . The horizontal lines and shaded regions represent the mean and 1 σ \sigma scatter of the empirical α [ C ​ ii ] \alpha_{\rm[C\,\textsc{ii}]} calibrations from Zanella et al. ( 2018 ) (pink, solid line) and Zhao et al. ( 2024 ) (cyan, dashed line), and the median of the sample studied in Rizzo et al. ( 2021 ) (cornflower blue, dash-dotted line). The large star symbols indicate the α [ C ​ ii ] \alpha_{\rm[C\,\textsc{ii}]} values we derive for REBELS-25 using the CMB-corrected CO luminosity and assuming either α CO = 3 \alpha_{\rm CO}=3 (magenta) or α CO = 1 \alpha_{\rm CO}=1 (aqua). The yellow and orange hexagons both refer to HZ10 (see text; Pavesi et al. , 2019 ; Algera et al. , 2025a ) , the latter has been slightly offset in redshift to avoid overlapping error bars. The values derived for REBELS-25 are broadly consistent with most low- and intermediate-redshift studies, suggesting that the [C ii ] line remains an effective, though scattered, tracer of the molecular gas reservoir even at z > 7 z>7 .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：[C ii]-H_2转换因子（α_[C ii]）随红移的演化。我们包括了文献中主序星系、星暴星系和莱曼断裂类似体的测量值（Stacey等人，1991；Ferkinhoff等人，2014；Huynh等人，2014；Magdis等人，2014；Capak等人，2015；Cormier等人，2015；Gullberg等人，2015；Schaerer等人，2015；Madden等人，2016；Accurso等人，2017；Contursi等人，2017；Hughes等人，2017；Zanella等人，2018；Rizzo等人，2020，2021）。水平线和阴影区域表示来自Zanella等人（2018）（粉色实线）和Zhao等人（2024）（青色虚线）的经验α_[C ii]校准的均值和1σ弥散，以及Rizzo等人（2021）研究样本的中值（矢车菊蓝点划线）。大星符号表示我们为REBELS-25推导的α_[C ii]值，使用经过CMB修正的CO光度并假设α_CO=3（洋红色）或α_CO=1（浅蓝色）。黄色和橙色六边形均指HZ10（见正文；Pavesi等人，2019；Algera等人，2025a），后者在红移上略有偏移以避免误差棒重叠。REBELS-25推导的值与大多数低和中等红移研究大致一致，表明[C ii]线即使在z>7时仍是分子气体储库的有效但弥散的示踪剂。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Resolved analysis of the [C ii ]– M gas M_{\rm gas} relation in REBELS-25 following the prescription of Vallini et al. ( 2025 ) based on simulated galaxies (see text for details). Maps of: [C ii ] surface brightness ( Σ [ C ​ ii ] \Sigma_{\rm[C\,\textsc{ii}]} , in L ⊙ {}_{\odot}\, kpc -2 ) derived from the high–S/N, high–resolution ( ∼ 0.14 ​ ″ / 700 \sim 0.14\arcsec/700\, pc) ALMA data ( left panel ); resolved [C ii ]-to-H 2 conversion factor ( W [ C ​ ii ] W_{\rm[C\,\textsc{ii}]} , in (M ⊙ {}_{\odot}\, kpc ) − 2 / ( {}^{-2})/( L ⊙ {}_{\odot}\, kpc -2 )) computed using Eq. 11 in V25 ( central panel ); resulting gas surface density ( Σ gas \Sigma_{\rm gas} , in M ⊙ {}_{\odot}\, kpc -2 ; right panel ). In each panel, we show the synthesized beam of the [C ii ] data as an ellipse in the bottom left corner and the contours of the [C ii ] emission at a 2 ​ σ 2\sigma level.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：遵循Vallini等人（2025）基于模拟星系的处方（详见正文），REBELS-25中[C ii]-M_gas关系的分辨分析。图：[C ii]面亮度（Σ_[C ii]，单位为L_⊙ kpc^{-2}），来自高信噪比、高分辨率（~0.14″/700 pc）的ALMA数据（左图）；分辨的[C ii]-H_2转换因子（W_[C ii]，单位为(M_⊙ kpc)^{-2}/(L_⊙ kpc^{-2})），使用V25中的公式11计算（中图）；由此产生的气体面密度（Σ_gas，单位为M_⊙ kpc^{-2}；右图）。在每个面板中，我们在左下角以椭圆显示[C ii]数据的合成波束，并以2σ水平显示[C ii]发射的等值线。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Summary of observational measurements and gas mass estimates for REBELS-25. The table lists synthesized beamwidth ( θ HPBW \theta_{\rm HPBW} ), observed line luminosities, molecular and total cold gas mass estimates derived using different tracers and assumptions (all CO-based estimates include the CMB correction; see Sec. 3.3.1 ), and the resulting [C ii ]–to–H 2 conversion factors.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：REBELS-25的观测测量和气体质量估计总结。该表列出了合成波束宽度（θ_HPBW）、观测到的线光度、使用不同示踪剂和假设推导的分子和总冷气体质量估计（所有基于CO的估计均包括CMB修正；见第3.3.1节），以及由此产生的[C ii]-H_2转换因子。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（JWST）在红移z≳5处发现的超大质量黑洞（BHs）可能为理解其种子起源提供关键线索。利用新的[18−72 Mpc]³ BRAHMA宇宙学模拟，我们研究了重种子模型的变化，结合次网格动力学摩擦模型，如何塑造z∼5和z∼0处的黑洞种群。我们考虑了两种“宽松”种子模型，其中所有包含足够致密且贫金属气体的晕形成约10⁴和约10⁵ M⊙的种子，以及一种“严格”种子模型，其中约10⁵ M⊙的种子仅在直接坍缩黑洞形成所启发的额外约束下形成。到z∼5时，所有模型产生的M*-MBH关系在M*≳10⁹ M⊙星系中与观测到的本地宇宙大致一致，但只有宽松情景产生了接近观测本地散点上包络的系统。在宿主MBH∼10⁸-10⁹ M⊙黑洞的星系中，宽松产生约10⁵ M⊙种子也产生了多个MBH/M*≳0.01的超大质量系统。尽管其增长主要由种子形成和并合主导，这些系统达到约10⁴³-10⁴⁵ erg s⁻¹的光度，与JWST探测到的黑洞推断值相当。作为一个关键的观测特征，宽松种子模型产生的并合率≳100 yr⁻¹，甚至在M*≲10⁷ M⊙的星系中本地黑洞占据比例接近1。相比之下，严格种子模型产生的并合率仅为约1 yr⁻¹，在M*≲10⁸ M⊙的星系中本地占据比例≲10%。因此，未来的引力波事件率和本地黑洞占据比例测量将为高红移黑洞组装的主导路径提供强约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：未来的引力波事件率和本地黑洞占据比例测量将为高红移黑洞组装的主导路径提供强约束，可区分不同种子形成机制。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Visualizations of the boxes at the final snapshots, illustrating the implementation of the Lenient-Heavy and Strict-Heavy seed models. The larger panels correspond to SUITE-z5 at z = 5 z=5 , and the inset panels correspond to SUITE-z0 at z = 0 z=0 . The left halves of the 2D maps show the gas density field, which smoothly transitions to the gas metallicity field on the right halves. Since all simulations with the same volume share identical initial conditions, we overplot the BHs produced by the different seed models on the same panels. BHs are overplotted as circles, colored black for Lenient-Heavy and green for Strict-Heavy seed models. The middle schematic (generated using OpenAI-GPT5) illustrates how we track BH growth from the DGB simulations along a galaxy (bFOF) merger tree. Overall, this figure summarizes our two-step seeding strategy: for each seed model, we first run high-resolution DGB boxes (left) that resolve the target seed mass and apply the DGB seeding prescription. We then follow the subsequent growth of these seeds and identify the galaxies in which they assemble higher-mass descendant BHs. These descendants are initialized as ESDs in lower-resolution boxes (right) with eight times larger volume.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：最终快照时各模拟盒的可视化，展示了宽松重种子和严格重种子模型的实施。较大的面板对应z=5时的SUITE-z5，插图面板对应z=0时的SUITE-z0。二维图的左半部分显示气体密度场，平滑过渡到右半部分的气体金属丰度场。由于相同体积的所有模拟共享相同的初始条件，我们在同一面板上叠加了不同种子模型产生的黑洞。黑洞以圆圈叠加，黑色代表宽松重种子模型，绿色代表严格重种子模型。中间的示意图（使用OpenAI-GPT5生成）说明了我们如何沿星系（bFOF）并合树追踪DGB模拟中的黑洞增长。总体而言，该图总结了我们两步种子形成策略：对于每个种子模型，我们首先运行高分辨率DGB盒（左），解析目标种子质量并应用DGB种子形成规则。然后，我们追踪这些种子的后续增长，并识别它们组装成更高质量后代黑洞的星系。这些后代被初始化为较低分辨率盒（右）中的ESD，体积大八倍。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Overview of the new BRAHMA boxes created in this work. SUITE-z0 simulations (upper half) with N DM = 512 3 N_{\rm DM}=512^{3} are run to z = 0 z=0 for the Lenient-Heavy and Strict-Heavy seed models. SUITE-z5 simulations (lower half) with N DM = 1024 3 N_{\rm DM}=1024^{3} are run to z = 5 z=5 for all three seed models. Due to the lower seed mass, the Lenient-LowMass simulations are 8 times higher in resolution and smaller in volume compared to the other models. DGB simulations [ 18 − 36 ​ Mpc ] 3 [18-36~\rm Mpc]^{3} (left side) are denoted as BRAHMA-*-D* , where the first ‘*’ represents the box-size, and the second ‘*’ represents the approximate gas mass resolution in log ⁡ 10 ​ [ M ⊙ ] \log 10[M_{\odot}] units. For all the DGB simulations, there are corresponding ESD simulations (right side) that are 8 times larger ( [ 36 − 72 ​ Mpc ] 3 [36-72~\rm Mpc]^{3} ), that are similarly denoted by BRAHMA-*-E* . For these ESD boxes, we show values of the 5 parameters that determine the stochastic galaxy mass criterion , calibrated from the higher resolution DGB simulations. Finally, for the Lenient-Heavy DGB simulations, ‘ N box = 1 + 3 N_{\rm box}=1+3 ’ means that we run three additional simulations with dynamics, accretion and feedback model variations.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本工作中创建的新BRAHMA盒概览。SUITE-z0模拟（上半部分）使用N_DM=512³运行至z=0，针对宽松重种子和严格重种子模型。SUITE-z5模拟（下半部分）使用N_DM=1024³运行至z=5，针对所有三种种子模型。由于种子质量较低，宽松低质量模拟的分辨率比其他模型高八倍，体积更小。DGB模拟（[18−36 Mpc]³，左侧）记为BRAHMA-*-D*，其中第一个“*”代表盒尺寸，第二个“*”代表以log₁₀[M⊙]为单位的大致气体质量分辨率。对于所有DGB模拟，有相应的ESD模拟（右侧），体积大八倍（[36−72 Mpc]³），类似地记为BRAHMA-*-E*。对于这些ESD盒，我们展示了五个参数的值，这些参数决定了随机星系质量判据，并根据更高分辨率的DGB模拟进行了校准。最后，对于宽松重种子DGB模拟，“N_box=1+3”意味着我们运行了三个额外的模拟，包含动力学、吸积和反馈模型的变化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Evolution of the BH number density for our three different seed models. The leftmost panel shows the overall number density, whereas middle and right panels show the number density of ≳ 10 5 ​ M ⊙ \gtrsim 10^{5}~M_{\odot} and ≳ 10 6 ​ M ⊙ \gtrsim 10^{6}~M_{\odot} BHs respectively. In the rightmost panel, the black marker shows the range of observational constraints obtained by integrating the range of z = 0 z=0 BHMF measurements compiled by Porras-Valverde et al. ( 2026 ) and shown by the grey region in Figure 6 . While the Lenient-LowMass model produces the highest numbers of seeds at ∼ 10 4 ​ M ⊙ \sim 10^{4}~M_{\odot} , it starts to assemble ≳ 10 5 ​ M ⊙ \gtrsim 10^{5}~M_{\odot} BHs much later than the Lenient-Heavy and Strict-Heavy models that seed at ∼ 10 5 ​ M ⊙ \sim 10^{5}~M_{\odot} .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：三种不同种子模型的黑洞数密度演化。最左侧面板显示总数密度，中间和右侧面板分别显示≳10⁵ M⊙和≳10⁶ M⊙黑洞的数密度。在最右侧面板中，黑色标记显示了通过整合Porras-Valverde等人（2026）编译的z=0 BHMF测量范围（图6中灰色区域所示）获得的观测约束范围。虽然宽松低质量模型在∼10⁴ M⊙处产生最多的种子，但它开始组装≳10⁵ M⊙黑洞的时间远晚于在∼10⁵ M⊙处播种的宽松重种子和严格重种子模型。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Similar to the previous figure, but here we compare the number density evolution produced by our subgrid-DF based BRAHMA-18-D5 boxes vs. prior results using repositioning (Bhowmick et al. , 2025b ) for our Lenient-Heavy and Strict-Heavy seed models. Under subgrid-DF, there is a substantial delay in the assembly of ≳ 10 6 ​ M ⊙ \gtrsim 10^{6}~M_{\odot} BHs compared to respositioning.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：与前一图类似，但这里我们比较了基于次网格DF的BRAHMA-18-D5盒与先前使用重定位方法（Bhowmick等人，2025b）在宽松重种子和严格重种子模型下产生的数密度演化。在次网格DF下，与重定位相比，≳10⁶ M⊙黑洞的组装存在显著延迟。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: For the DGB simulations, we show the fractional contribution to BH growth from seeding and mergers as opposed to gas accretion. For the different seed models, this is shown as a function of BH mass for populations at z = 0 z=0 (left) and z = 5 z=5 (right). In the early phase of BH growth, the majority ( ≳ 50 % \gtrsim 50\% ) of the BH mass is contributed by seeding and mergers, while gas accretion becomes dominant in the later phase.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：对于DGB模拟，我们展示了种子形成和并合相对于气体吸积对黑洞增长的贡献比例。对于不同的种子模型，这显示为z=0（左）和z=5（右）时黑洞质量的函数。在黑洞增长的早期阶段，大部分（≳50%）黑洞质量由种子形成和并合贡献，而气体吸积在后期阶段占主导。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: BHMFs predicted by different seeding models at z = 5 z=5 (top row) and z = 0 z=0 (bottom row). Thick lines show the DGB predictions, while thin lines show the calibrated ESD predictions. The dashed lines indicate the repositioning-based predictions for the Lenient-Heavy seed model. The left column shows the full BH population, while the right column includes only active BHs with L bol ≳ 10 43 ​ erg ​ s − 1 L_{\rm bol}\gtrsim 10^{43}\ \mathrm{erg\ s^{-1}} . Black data points show current observational constraints from JWST for z ∼ 4 z\sim 4 – 7 7 BHs in the top row (Fei et al. , 2025 ; Taylor et al. , 2024 ) , and the grey region spans the current spread of local constraints as compiled by Porras-Valverde et al. ( 2026 ) . Our subgrid-DF based predictions are in broad agreement with current z ∼ 5 z\sim 5 JWST constraints at the massive end.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：不同种子模型在z=5（上行）和z=0（下行）预测的黑洞质量函数。粗线显示DGB预测，细线显示校准后的ESD预测。虚线表示宽松重种子模型基于重定位的预测。左列显示整个黑洞种群，右列仅包括L_bol≳10⁴³ erg s⁻¹的活动黑洞。黑色数据点显示当前JWST对z∼4-7黑洞的观测约束（上行，Fei等人，2025；Taylor等人，2024），灰色区域覆盖了Porras-Valverde等人（2026）编译的当前本地约束的散布范围。我们基于次网格DF的预测在大质量端与当前z∼5的JWST约束大致一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Bolometric (left) and X-ray (right) AGNLFs at z = 5 z=5 (top) and z = 0 z=0 (bottom) for the DGB (thick lines) and ESD (thin lines) predictions. We note here that the ESD boxes produce smaller luminosities compared to the DGB boxes at z = 5 z=5 because the BH accretion rates are not well converged at these resolutions. For the X-ray AGNLFs, we apply bolometric corrections derived by Shen et al. ( 2020 ) . The plot legends for the simulations are the same as those in the BHMF panel. Black data points correspond to observational constraints. We compare our z ∼ 5 z\sim 5 predictions with high- z z bolometric AGNLFs derived from JWST (Greene et al. , 2024 ; Akins et al. , 2025 ; Kokorev et al. , 2024a ; Greene et al. , 2025 ) , as well as recent X-ray constraints from Barlow-Hall and Aird ( 2025 ) . For the JWST constraints, we show the original measurements (filled black points) and those adjusted using updated bolometric corrections (open black points) from Greene et al. ( 2025 ) . At z ∼ 0 z\sim 0 , we compare to local constraints (Hopkins et al. , 2007 ; Aird et al. , 2015 ; Shen et al. , 2020 ) . Our high- z z AGN populations broadly align with current X-ray constraints, and are somewhat higher than the JWST constraints from LRDs.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：z=5（上行）和z=0（下行）的DGB（粗线）和ESD（细线）预测的辐射（左）和X射线（右）活动星系核光度函数。我们注意到，在z=5时，ESD盒产生的光度低于DGB盒，因为在这些分辨率下黑洞吸积率未充分收敛。对于X射线AGN LF，我们应用了Shen等人（2020）推导的辐射修正。模拟的图例与BHMF面板相同。黑色数据点对应观测约束。我们将z∼5的预测与JWST推导的高z辐射AGN LF（Greene等人，2024；Akins等人，2025；Kokorev等人，2024a；Greene等人，2025）以及Barlow-Hall和Aird（2025）最近的X射线约束进行比较。对于JWST约束，我们显示了原始测量值（实心黑点）和使用Greene等人（2025）更新辐射修正调整后的值（空心黑点）。在z∼0时，我们与本地约束（Hopkins等人，2007；Aird等人，2015；Shen等人，2020）进行比较。我们的高z AGN种群与当前X射线约束大致一致，略高于来自LRD的JWST约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Predictions for the M ∗ M_{*} – M BH M_{\rm BH} relation for different seeding models. We focus exclusively on central BHs, plotting the mass of the most massive BH in each halo against the total stellar mass. Each panel corresponds to a given seeding model; smaller circles show DGB boxes and larger circles show calibrated ESD boxes. The top and bottom rows show results at z = 5 z=5 and z = 0 z=0 , respectively. On the top row, black points show JWST measurements at z ∼ 4 z\sim 4 – 7 7 , while the black lines show the intrinsic high- z z relations inferred by Pacucci et al. 2023 (solid), Li et al. 2025b (dotted) and Jones et al. 2025 (dashed) after accounting for selection biases. On the bottom row, grey stars show measurements in local dwarf galaxies (Schutte et al. , 2019 ) . The shaded grey region broadly represents the scatter in the local BH population compiled by Habouzit et al. ( 2021 ) by combining BH samples from Kormendy and Ho ( 2013 ) and Reines and Volonteri ( 2015 ) . At z ∼ 5 z\sim 5 , central BHs are broadly consistent with the local relation at M ∗ ≳ 10 9 ​ M ⊙ M_{*}\gtrsim 10^{9}~M_{\odot} . Only the lenient models produce overmassive BHs ( M BH / M ∗ ≳ 0.01 M_{\rm BH}/M_{*}\gtrsim 0.01 ) in M ∗ ∼ 10 8 M_{*}\sim 10^{8} – 10 9 ​ M ⊙ 10^{9}~M_{\odot} galaxies, highlighted in red.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：不同种子模型对M*-MBH关系的预测。我们仅关注中心黑洞，绘制每个晕中最质量黑洞的质量与总恒星质量的关系。每个面板对应一个给定的种子模型；小圆圈显示DGB盒，大圆圈显示校准后的ESD盒。上行和下行分别显示z=5和z=0的结果。在上行，黑点显示JWST在z∼4-7的测量值，黑线显示Pacucci等人2023（实线）、Li等人2025b（点线）和Jones等人2025（虚线）在考虑选择偏差后推断的内在z高关系。在下行，灰星显示本地矮星系中的测量值（Schutte等人，2019）。灰色阴影区域大致代表Habouzit等人（2021）通过结合Kormendy和Ho（2013）以及Reines和Volonteri（2015）的黑洞样本编译的本地黑洞种群的散布。在z∼5时，中心黑洞在M*≳10⁹ M⊙处与本地关系大致一致。只有宽松模型在M*∼10⁸-10⁹ M⊙的星系中产生超大质量黑洞（MBH/M*≳0.01），以红色突出显示。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们基于高分辨率哈勃太空望远镜成像以及作为DUVET巡天一部分的凯克宇宙网成像仪积分场光谱数据，对矮星暴星系NGC 1569中的星团进行了贝叶斯分析。对于每个已识别的星团，我们使用正向建模方法推断其质量和年龄的后验概率分布，该方法适当考虑了初始质量函数随机抽样带来的不确定性。我们通过使用不同的滤光片组合（包括模拟添加HST紫外波段和詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜成像的紫外和近红外扩展）重复分析，研究了推断性质对测光覆盖范围的依赖性。我们发现，虽然包含这些波长范围进一步打破了年龄和质量简并，但当前可用的数据对星团参数提供了相当强的约束。我们将推断的星团性质与局部星际介质的条件进行比较，并发现了多个有趣相关性的证据。星团质量函数的截断质量随星系中心距离变化，特别是在离开盘面时，这与对星际介质密度的依赖性一致。星团质量与金属丰度正相关，表明大质量星团优先在预富集气体中形成；同时与气体的电离状态正相关，反映了高质量星团中大质量恒星比例的增加。这些结果展示了贝叶斯、初始质量函数感知建模在解析近邻星暴矮星系星团群体方面的能力，并为星团形成和反馈如何响应局部星系条件提供了新见解。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论为：贝叶斯、初始质量函数感知的建模方法能有效解析近邻星暴矮星系中的星团群体，揭示了星团形成和反馈与局部星系条件之间的新关联。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : HST composite image of NGC 1569; red: F658N filter ( H α \alpha + [ N ii ]), green: F606W filter, light blue: F502N filter ([ O iii ]) and dark blue: F487N filter ( H β \beta ). The three rectangles show our three KCWI positions. The KCWI data cover 54 ″ 54\text{\,}\mathrm{\SIUnitSymbolArcsecond} ( ∼ \sim 800 pc) across the major axis and 48 ″ 48\text{\,}\mathrm{\SIUnitSymbolArcsecond} ( ∼ \sim 700 pc) across the minor axis. The inlay in the bottom right shows a 3 colour image constructed from our KCWI data using our three broadbands as RGB, (red: KCWI 4601, green: KCWI 4101, blue: KCWI 3600). See also Fig. 1 in Hamel-Bravo et al. ( 2024 )
figures.caption_zh: 图1：NGC 1569的HST合成图像；红色：F658N滤光片（Hα+[N ii]），绿色：F606W滤光片，浅蓝色：F502N滤光片（[O iii]），深蓝色：F487N滤光片（Hβ）。三个矩形显示了我们的三个KCWI位置。KCWI数据覆盖长轴54角秒（约800 pc）和短轴48角秒（约700 pc）。右下角插图显示了使用我们的三个宽带作为RGB（红色：KCWI 4601，绿色：KCWI 4101，蓝色：KCWI 3600）从KCWI数据构建的三色图像。另见Hamel-Bravo等人（2024）的图1。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Description and motivation of the parameters used for point source detection and aperture photometry using photutils .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：使用photutils进行点源检测和孔径测光所用参数的描述和动机。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Histograms showing the distribution of magnitudes in 3 bands: HST ACS F814W, KCWI 3600, and KCWI H β \beta using both the 3 σ \sigma (pink) and 5 σ \sigma (magenta) detection thresholds. The magnitudes have been corrected for foreground extinction.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：直方图显示三个波段（HST ACS F814W、KCWI 3600和KCWI Hβ）的星等分布，分别使用3σ（粉色）和5σ（品红色）检测阈值。星等已校正前景消光。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : A schematic comparing the methods of aperture photometry extraction in the the high spatial resolution HST (upper panel) and lower resolution custom KCWI (lower panel) filters.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：比较高空间分辨率HST（上方面板）和较低分辨率定制KCWI（下方面板）滤光片中孔径测光提取方法的示意图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Left: CMD showing the photometry of clusters in NGC 1569 (pink circles) and the LEGUS clusters in UGC 1249 (magenta crosses), and UGC 685 (brown squares). The contours in the background show the density of the simulated cluster library. The vertical axis shows the absolute magnitude in F814W, the horizontal axis shows the colour defined F606W - F814W. The marginal plots are density histogram of each of the catalogues over both axes. Right: CMD comparing the extracted KCWI photometry to the synthetic photometry. The vertical axis shows the magnitude in KCWI 4101, and the horizontal shows a colour defined by KCWI 3600 - KCWI 4601. The pink points show our observed photometry, while the countours show the simulated library. In both panels, the overall colour distribution is comparable between the observed and synthetic photometry.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左图：NGC 1569中星团的测光（粉色圆圈）与UGC 1249中LEGUS星团（品红色十字）和UGC 685中星团（棕色方块）的颜色-星等图。背景等高线显示模拟星团库的密度。纵轴为F814W绝对星等，横轴为F606W - F814W颜色。边缘图为每个星表在两个轴上的密度直方图。右图：比较提取的KCWI测光与合成测光的颜色-星等图。纵轴为KCWI 4101星等，横轴为KCWI 3600 - KCWI 4601颜色。粉色点显示观测测光，等高线显示模拟库。在两个面板中，观测和合成测光的整体颜色分布相当。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Correlations between synthetic cluster magnitudes and intrinsic properties from SLUG simulations, including nebular emission and extinction. Each panel shows the magnitude in a different band as a function of cluster mass (left), age (middle), and ionising photon flux Q 0 Q_{0} (right). Broad red bands (F814W) are most sensitive to cluster mass but weakly dependent on age and Q 0 Q_{0} , while narrowband H β \beta is strongly age- and Q 0 Q_{0} -sensitive. Intermediate-width blue bands (e.g., KCWI 3600) provide complementary information. These correlations illustrate why broad and intermediate-width bands are sufficient to robustly constrain cluster properties, motivating our final filter selection.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：来自SLUG模拟的合成星团星等与内在性质（包括星云发射和消光）之间的相关性。每个面板显示不同波段的星等作为星团质量（左）、年龄（中）和电离光子通量Q0（右）的函数。宽红色波段（F814W）对星团质量最敏感，但对年龄和Q0依赖性弱；而窄带Hβ对年龄和Q0高度敏感。中等宽度蓝色波段（如KCWI 3600）提供补充信息。这些相关性说明了为什么宽和中等宽度波段足以稳健约束星团性质，从而激励了我们的最终滤光片选择。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Corner plot showing results of Bayesian inference for one cluster. Each of the marginal plots has a black solid line showing their median and two dotted pink lines for the 25th and 75th percentiles. From this we see that using the median along with these percentiles is a good representation of the distribution, including much of the two separate peaks in the age distribution, while using the peak value would simply set the age at the higher of the two peaks. The crosses in the contour plot show the properties of the 10 most photometrically similar clusters in our simulated library, with the most opaque markers being the best matches.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：显示一个星团贝叶斯推断结果的角落图。每个边缘图有一条黑色实线表示中位数，两条粉色虚线表示第25和第75百分位数。由此我们看到，使用中位数及这些百分位数能很好地代表分布，包括年龄分布中两个分离峰的大部分，而使用峰值则会简单地将年龄设为两个峰中较高的一个。等高线图中的十字显示模拟库中10个最相似测光的星团的性质，最不透明的标记为最佳匹配。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : Scatter plot comparing the inferred age of the synthetic cluster population to the ages from the generated catalogue using all available photometric filters (i.e., HST/ACS and KCWI broad- and narrowband). The black dashed line shows the 1:1 line. Magenta triangles show points determined as a median of the distribution, and pink circles show the results when using the peak. We see that although the age is generally well constrained, their is a grouping of the inferred age at ∼ 10 6 \sim 10^{6} yrs, whether the peak or the median is used.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：散点图比较使用所有可用测光滤光片（即HST/ACS和KCWI宽带及窄带）时推断的合成星团群体年龄与生成星表中的年龄。黑色虚线显示1:1线。品红色三角形显示分布中位数确定的点，粉色圆圈显示使用峰值时的结果。我们看到，虽然年龄通常被良好约束，但无论使用峰值还是中位数，推断年龄在约10^6年处存在聚集。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 利用哈勃空间望远镜（HST）和詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（JWST）对NGC 628在0.3–7.7微米波段的观测，我们使用CIGALE拟合了超过12,000个光学选中的星团、涌现年轻星团（eYSC）以及MIRI选源的光谱能量分布（SED），以推导其年龄、质量、消光和尘埃性质。我们发现，近红外选中的eYSC-I（致密Paα和3.3微米PAH发射）和eYSC-II（致密Paα和弥散3.3微米PAH发射）源的峰值年龄约为3–5百万年，其中约12%的星团具有E(B-V)>2，表明星团在涌现过程中存在尘埃包裹的星族。此外，多环芳烃（PAH）丰度分数（q_PAH）和恒星与星云消光比（E(B-V)_star/E(B-V)_neb）的分布暗示了一个演化序列，即源从eYSC-I演化为eYSC-II，同时星团清除其周围的尘埃和气体。从eYSC-I与光学可见星团的比例推断出的光致离解区（PDR）清除时标约为4百万年。另外，我们发现NGC 628旋臂中的星团比旋臂间区域的星团更倾向于具有更大质量和更强的尘埃红化。最后，我们发现约65%的eYSC-I、约27%的eYSC-II和约40%的F335M选源在4像素内与我们的MIRI选星表中的F770W峰值重合，证实了F770W亮源优先示踪最年轻和最尘埃密集的区域。总体而言，我们的结果突显了JWST结合CIGALE模型网格在识别和表征处于短暂嵌入阶段的eYSC方面的能力，并为制约星团涌现过程中的反馈机制提供了约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：JWST结合CIGALE模型网格能够有效识别和表征处于短暂嵌入阶段的年轻星团，为星团涌现过程中的反馈机制提供了约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Examples of spectral energy distribution (SED) fits for representative eYSC-I ( Left ) and eYSC-II ( Right ) sources identified in NGC 628. The solid black line shows the best-fitting cigale model, with the unattenuated (attenuated) stellar emission shown in blue (yellow), nebular emission in green, and the dust emission in red. The observed and model fluxes corresponds to the purple and red points respectively. These examples illustrate an evolutionary sequence where eYSC-I sources are very young, dust-embedded clusters with strong NIR excess and nebular emission, and eYSC-II sources are moderately young clusters where extinction is lower and PAH/dust features are weaker.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：NGC 628中代表性eYSC-I（左）和eYSC-II（右）源的光谱能量分布（SED）拟合示例。黑色实线显示最佳拟合的CIGALE模型，其中未衰减（衰减）的恒星发射以蓝色（黄色）显示，星云发射以绿色显示，尘埃发射以红色显示。观测和模型通量分别对应紫色和红色点。这些示例说明了一个演化序列：eYSC-I源是非常年轻、尘埃包裹的星团，具有强烈的近红外超和星云发射；eYSC-II源是中等年轻的星团，消光较低，PAH/尘埃特征较弱。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Total eYSC detections represents the number of sources identified with Sextractor, and the final catalogs are the total number of sources that have a CIGALE-fitted χ 2 ≤ 20 \chi^{2}\leq 20 . For the final MIRI-selected catalog we apply the same χ 2 ≤ 20 \chi^{2}\leq 20 cut, and require sources to match a source in either the eYSCI, II, or F335M-selected catalogs within 4 MIRI pixels. For the final optically-selected catalog we apply the same χ 2 \chi^{2} cut, and additionally require all sources to be detected within our JWST NIRCam footprint and have machine-learning based optical classifications of 1, 2, or 3.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：eYSC总探测数表示使用Sextractor识别的源数量，最终星表是具有CIGALE拟合χ² ≤ 20的源总数。对于最终的MIRI选星表，我们应用相同的χ² ≤ 20截断，并要求源在4个MIRI像素内与eYSC-I、II或F335M选星表中的源匹配。对于最终的光学选星表，我们应用相同的χ²截断，并额外要求所有源在我们的JWST NIRCam覆盖范围内被探测到，且具有基于机器学习的1、2或3类光学分类。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: The electron density ( n e n_{\rm e} ) defines the gas density of the ionized regions and impacts the strength of nebular emission. The ionization parameter (log(U)) describes the ratio of ionizing photon density to gas density and regulates emission line intensities. The escape fraction ( f esc f_{\rm esc} ) represents the fraction of ionizing photons that escape the system without contributing to nebular emission, while f dust f_{\rm dust} defines the fraction of Lyman continuum photons absorbed by dust. The E ​ ( B − V ) ∗ / E ​ ( B − V ) neb E(B-V)_{*}/E(B-V)_{\rm neb} parametrizes the differential attenuation between stellar continuum and nebular emission. The dust attenuation power-law slope ( δ \delta ) modifies the shape of the attenuation curve relative to the standard prescription. The parameter q PAH q_{\rm PAH} represents the fraction of dust mass in polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons. The parameters γ \gamma , α \alpha , and U min U_{\rm min} are associated with the dust emission model of Draine & Li (2007). Specifically, γ \gamma is the fraction of dust mass exposed to a power-law distribution of radiation field intensities, α \alpha is the slope of that distribution, and U min U_{\rm min} is the minimum interstellar radiation field heating the diffuse dust component. Together, these parameters regulate the shape and intensity of the infrared dust emission in the modeled SEDs. Overall, our choice of model parameters to fit the eYSC-I, eYSC-II, F335M-selected, and F770W-selected sources in NGC 628 results in a total model grid of 153538560 individual SEDs.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：电子密度（n_e）定义了电离区的气体密度，并影响星云发射的强度。电离参数（log(U)）描述了电离光子密度与气体密度之比，并调节发射线强度。逃逸分数（f_esc）表示逃逸系统而不贡献星云发射的电离光子比例，而f_dust定义了被尘埃吸收的莱曼连续谱光子比例。E(B-V)_*/E(B-V)_neb参数化了恒星连续谱与星云发射之间的差异消光。尘埃消光幂律斜率（δ）相对于标准描述修改了消光曲线的形状。参数q_PAH表示尘埃质量中多环芳烃的比例。参数γ、α和U_min与Draine & Li (2007)的尘埃发射模型相关。具体来说，γ是暴露于辐射场强度幂律分布的尘埃质量分数，α是该分布的斜率，U_min是加热弥散尘埃成分的最小星际辐射场。这些参数共同调节了模型SED中红外尘埃发射的形状和强度。总体而言，我们选择拟合NGC 628中eYSC-I、eYSC-II、F335M选源和F770W选源的模型参数，导致总模型网格包含153,538,560个独立SED。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: See Table 2 for a full description of each model parameter. Overall, our choice of model parameters to fit the optically-selected sources in NGC 628 results in a total model grid of 772001280 individual SEDs.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：每个模型参数的完整描述见表2。总体而言，我们选择拟合NGC 628中光学选源的模型参数，导致总模型网格包含772,001,280个独立SED。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Left: The fractional residuals between our observed optically-selected star cluster catalog and the best-fitting model fluxes based on cigale when restricted to λ < 2 \lambda<2 μ \mu m to better-match SSP models which do not include any contributions from hot dust or PAH emission. Middle: Histograms of the difference in the derived age of optically-selected star clusters in NGC 628 relative to Yggdrasil stellar population fits. Right: Histograms of the difference in the derived mass relative to Yggdrasil stellar population fits. In both panels the distribution of sources with a best fit metallically of z = 0.004 =0.004 and an E ​ ( B − V ) ≥ 0.2 E(B{-}V)\geq 0.2 are shown in pink. Overall, we find that cigale can successfully fit the sample of optically-selected sources in NGC 628, and is in general agreement with the results of more traditionally-adopted SSP models.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：左图：当限制在λ < 2微米以更好地匹配不包含热尘埃或PAH发射贡献的SSP模型时，我们的光学选星团星表与基于CIGALE的最佳拟合模型通量之间的分数残差。中图：NGC 628中光学选星团相对于Yggdrasil星族拟合的年龄差异直方图。右图：相对于Yggdrasil星族拟合的质量差异直方图。在两个面板中，最佳拟合金属丰度为z=0.004且E(B-V) ≥ 0.2的源分布以粉色显示。总体而言，我们发现CIGALE能够成功拟合NGC 628中的光学选源样本，并且与更传统采用的SSP模型的结果总体一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The near-IR color–color diagram of eYSC-I (red), eYSC-II (orange), and F335M-selected (green) sources in NGC 628 using F150W-F200W and F200W-F335M colors with the median value for each distribution shown as a square, pentagon, and triangle respectively. Overlaid in dark blue is a Yggdrasil SSP model track with solar metallicity and a Kroupa IMF (Kroupa, 2001 ) . In light blue we show the same SSP model track using the cigale grid presented in Table 2 with the Draine et al. ( 2014 ) dust model. The top-left arrows represent an extinction of A V = 5 A_{V}=5 and the maximum contribution to the F335M flux from 3.3 μ \mu m PAH emission determined for star-forming regions within galaxies observed as part of the PHANGS-JWST survey respectively (Sandstrom et al. , 2023 ) . This comparison demonstrates that purely stellar models under-predict the red F200W-F335M colors of the youngest sources, reflecting excess emission from dust and 3.3 μ \mu m PAH emission for the young and most dust-embedded eYSCs in NGC 628. The gray box indicates the embedded-cluster color selection introduced by Linden et al. ( 2023 , 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：NGC 628中eYSC-I（红色）、eYSC-II（橙色）和F335M选源（绿色）的近红外颜色-颜色图，使用F150W-F200W和F200W-F335M颜色，每个分布的中值分别以方形、五边形和三角形显示。深蓝色叠加的是太阳金属丰度和Kroupa IMF（Kroupa, 2001）的Yggdrasil SSP模型轨迹。浅蓝色显示使用表2中CIGALE网格和Draine et al. (2014)尘埃模型的相同SSP模型轨迹。左上箭头分别表示消光A_V=5和由PHANGS-JWST巡天观测到的星系内恒星形成区确定的F335M通量中3.3微米PAH发射的最大贡献（Sandstrom et al., 2023）。这一比较表明，纯恒星模型低估了最年轻源的红色F200W-F335M颜色，反映了NGC 628中年轻且尘埃包裹最深的eYSC的尘埃和3.3微米PAH发射的超额。灰色框表示Linden et al. (2023, 2024)引入的嵌入星团颜色选择。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Results of the full cigale SED fitting for eYSC candidates in NGC 628. Panels show the distributions of best-fit ages ( Left ), stellar masses ( Middle ), and extinction E ​ ( B − V ) E(B{-}V) ( Right ). The distribution of ages for eYSC-I and II sources peaks at ∼ 3 − 5 \sim 3-5 Myr. eYSC sources in NGC 628 have masses from 10 3 10^{3} – 10 4 10^{4} M ⊙ , with a wide range of extinctions peaking at ∼ 0.5 \sim 0.5 and extending to values as high as E ​ ( B − V ) = 3 E(B{-}V)=3 . Dashed histograms show the subset of eYSC sources identified as being embedded using the color selection criteria of Linden et al. ( 2023 , 2024 ) . These embedded clusters are systematically younger and more reddened than the general eYSC population, confirming that this color selection provides an efficient diagnostic for identifying clusters in their early emerging phase, and suggests an evolutionary sequence for emerging clusters which clear their surrounding dust and gas as they evolve from eYSC-I to eYSC-II sources.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：NGC 628中eYSC候选体的完整CIGALE SED拟合结果。面板显示了最佳拟合年龄（左）、恒星质量（中）和消光E(B-V)（右）的分布。eYSC-I和II源的年龄分布峰值在约3–5百万年。NGC 628中的eYSC源质量范围为10^3–10^4 M☉，消光范围广泛，峰值约0.5，最高可达E(B-V)=3。虚线直方图显示了使用Linden et al. (2023, 2024)颜色选择标准识别为嵌入星团的eYSC源子集。这些嵌入星团在系统上比一般eYSC星族更年轻且更红，证实了这种颜色选择为识别处于早期涌现阶段的星团提供了有效诊断，并暗示了涌现星团在从eYSC-I演化为eYSC-II源时清除周围尘埃和气体的演化序列。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Comparison between the best-fit ages ( Left ), extinction E ​ ( B − V ) E(B{-}V) ( Middle ), and q P ​ A ​ H q_{\mathrm{P}AH} ( Right ) of our F770W-selected sources (grey histogram) which overlap an eYSC-I, II, or F335M-selected source within 4 pixels. Using the same model grid adopted for our emerging cluster catalogs, the fits extend out to 7.7 μ \mu m to include F560W and F770W observations with MIRI. In red, yellow, and green we show the individual distributions of eYSC-I, eYSC-II, and F335M-selected sources fit up to F444W from Figure 4. Overall we find that our MIRI-selected sources closely follow the distributions of age, extinction and q PAH q_{\mathrm{PAH}} as we derive for eYSC-I sources using our NIRCam-only catalogs.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：我们的F770W选源（灰色直方图）中与eYSC-I、II或F335M选源在4像素内重叠的源的最佳拟合年龄（左）、消光E(B-V)（中）和q_PAH（右）的比较。使用与涌现星团星表相同的模型网格，拟合延伸至7.7微米，包括MIRI的F560W和F770W观测。红色、黄色和绿色分别显示了来自图4的eYSC-I、eYSC-II和F335M选源（拟合至F444W）的个体分布。总体而言，我们发现MIRI选源的年龄、消光和q_PAH分布与我们使用仅NIRCam星表为eYSC-I源推导的结果密切一致。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用GIZMO代码对一个大质量星系（在z~10时恒星质量Ms~10^10 M⊙）进行了宇宙学zoom-in模拟。通过采用≤3 pc的空间分辨率和3.4 Myr的超新星反馈延迟，我们捕捉到了星团中的无反馈星暴（FFB）。该模拟再现了FFB模型的预测以及JWST观测到的超亮星系。在z~10时，冷流物质供给一个致密星系（有效半径Re~1 kpc），其恒星密度和面密度（>10^5 cm^-3，>10^5 M⊙ pc^-2）超过了FFB阈值。整体恒星形成效率（SFE）为ε_s~0.2–0.3，伴随着波动的恒星形成历史。我们识别出超过10^5个星团（恒星质量M_⋆>10^4.5 M⊙），其质量分布近乎无标度（dN/dlog M ∝ M^-1.06）。约90%的恒星形成发生在星团中，这些星团在任一时刻占总恒星质量的30%–40%。大多数质量小于10^7 M⊙的星团，其恒星形成以短于3 Myr的爆发形式发生，局部SFE约为0.5±0.2。星团的金属丰度（-2.01 < log(Z/Z⊙) < -0.45）表明存在快速的物质循环。反馈驱动的外流典型温度为10^7 K，典型速度约为2000 km s^-1。在高度动态的中心1 kpc区域内，星团经历快速轨道衰减并合并，形成扁平的核星星团。星团形状从扁球到长球不等，中位形状为三轴椭球。这些星团与JWST观测结果一致，其中一部分可能存活下来，形成低红移的球状星团。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：模拟成功再现了无反馈星暴模型和JWST观测的超亮星系，部分星团可能演化为低红移的球状星团。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The stellar feedback energy injection rate implemented in GIZMO for an instantaneous starburst in a star cluster of 10 6 ​ M ⊙ 10^{6}\rm M_{\odot} and 0.2 solar metallicity. Dashed curves with various colours show different stellar feedback source, and black solid line shows the total feedback energy. As comparison, the red solid line gives the feedback energy injection rate as computed by starburst99 assuming Kroupa IMF (Kroupa, 2001 ) and 0.2 solar metallicity.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在GIZMO中实现的，对于一个质量为10^6 M⊙、金属丰度为0.2倍太阳丰度的瞬时星暴星团，其恒星反馈能量注入率。不同颜色的虚线表示不同的恒星反馈源，黑色实线表示总反馈能量。作为对比，红色实线给出了由starburst99（假设Kroupa初始质量函数，Kroupa, 2001，以及0.2倍太阳金属丰度）计算得到的反馈能量注入率。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: A 50 ​ k ​ p ​ c × 50 ​ k ​ p ​ c × 10 ​ k ​ p ​ c 50\rm kpc\times 50kpc\times 10kpc slice of the simulated massive galaxy at z = 10.46 z=10.46 . The left panels show the projected gas density (top) and stellar density (bottom). The upper‐right panel displays the line‐of‐sight, density‐weighted temperature map overlaid with gas velocity vectors. The lower‐right panel presents a mock optical image in the i , v and u bands, with a surface‐brightness limit of 29.5 ​ mag ​ arcsec − 2 29.5\rm mag\,arcsec^{-2} (comparable to JWST data). The dashed circle indicates the virial radius. In the second, third, and fourth quadrants, we annotate the total gas mass, stellar mass, and virial mass enclosed within the virial radius, respectively. Each of these panels also includes two inset plots showing a cascaded zoom‐in view. Note that the colour bar for the lower‐right inset in the stellar density panel has been rescaled to accommodate its large density range.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：模拟大质量星系在z=10.46时的50 kpc × 50 kpc × 10 kpc切片。左图显示投影气体密度（上）和恒星密度（下）。右上图显示视线方向、密度加权的温度图，并叠加了气体速度矢量。右下图展示了i、v和u波段的模拟光学图像，表面亮度极限为29.5 mag arcsec^-2（与JWST数据相当）。虚线圆圈表示维里半径。在第二、第三和第四象限中，我们分别标注了维里半径内的总气体质量、恒星质量和维里质量。每个面板还包含两个插图，显示级联放大视图。注意，恒星密度面板中右下插图的色标已重新调整以适应其较大的密度范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Basic properties of the simulated massive galaxy as function of cosmic time. The panels arranged from top to bottom illustrate: (top) the mass accretion histories of different components. Solid curves represent dark matter, gas, and stellar mass growth within R vir R_{\rm vir} , dashed curves show corresponding growth within the 1 ​ k ​ p ​ c 1\rm kpc range; (bottom) the evolution of five characteristic radii: the virial radius ( R vir R_{\rm vir} in black curve), the half light radius ( R e R_{\rm e} in red dashed curve), and the radii enclosing 30% , 50% and 90% of the total stellar mass ( R 30 R_{30} in dotted curve, R 50 R_{50} in green dashed curve and R 90 R_{90} in solid green curve), respectively. The shaded band represents the 3 − 6 % ​ R vir 3-6\%R_{\rm vir} range. As comparison, 6 high- z z galaxies are listed. The upper panel shows their total stellar mass, while the bottom panel shows their effective radius. These results are from: JADES-GS-z14-0 (Helton et al. , 2025 ) , JADES-GS-z13-0 (Robertson et al. , 2023 ; Hainline et al. , 2024 ) , GLASS-z12 (Calabrò et al. , 2024 ) , GN-z11 (Bunker et al. , 2023 ; Tacchella et al. , 2023 ) , Gz9p3 (Boyett et al. , 2024 ) , MACS0416-Y1 (Harshan et al. , 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：模拟大质量星系的基本性质随宇宙时间的变化。从上到下的面板依次展示：（上）不同成分的质量累积历史。实线表示R_vir内的暗物质、气体和恒星质量增长，虚线表示1 kpc范围内的相应增长；（下）五个特征半径的演化：维里半径（R_vir，黑色曲线）、半光半径（R_e，红色虚线），以及分别包含总恒星质量30%、50%和90%的半径（R_30，点线；R_50，绿色虚线；R_90，绿色实线）。阴影带表示3–6% R_vir的范围。作为对比，列出了6个高红移星系。上图显示其总恒星质量，下图显示其有效半径。这些结果来自：JADES-GS-z14-0 (Helton et al., 2025), JADES-GS-z13-0 (Robertson et al., 2023; Hainline et al., 2024), GLASS-z12 (Calabrò et al., 2024), GN-z11 (Bunker et al., 2023; Tacchella et al., 2023), Gz9p3 (Boyett et al., 2024), MACS0416-Y1 (Harshan et al., 2024)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The evolution of star formation efficiency, stellar mass fraction and baryon fraction. The solid and dashed curve represent stellar mass fraction (see definition in text) within R vir R_{\rm vir} and 1 ​ k ​ p ​ c 1\rm kpc range, respectively. The dotted curve shows the evolution of global star formation efficiency ε s \varepsilon_{s} . The shaded region highlights ε s < 0.2 \rm\varepsilon_{s}<0.2 ; (bottom) the star formation histories within R vir R_{\rm vir} (orange histogram) and 1 ​ k ​ p ​ c 1\rm kpc (blue histogram).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：恒星形成效率、恒星质量分数和重子分数的演化。实线和虚线分别表示R_vir和1 kpc范围内的恒星质量分数（定义见正文）。点线表示整体恒星形成效率ε_s的演化。阴影区域突出显示ε_s < 0.2的部分；（下）R_vir内（橙色直方图）和1 kpc内（蓝色直方图）的恒星形成历史。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Spherically averaged radial profiles of the stellar (red), gas (blue), and dark matter (black) components of the central galaxy. The dotted, dash-dotted, dashed, and solid lines correspond to redshifts z = 16.06 z=16.06 , 12.57, 10.46, 9.01, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：中心星系恒星（红色）、气体（蓝色）和暗物质（黑色）成分的球对称平均径向轮廓。点线、点划线、虚线和实线分别对应红移z = 16.06、12.57、10.46和9.01。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Morphology and spatial distribution of 20 randomly selected star clusters (left) and dense gas clouds (right) identified using the FoF algorithm in our simulation. Cluster/Cloud masses are indicated at the top of each panel. For star clusters, both the formation time ( t form t_{\rm form} ) and the standard deviation of their star formation histories ( σ SFH \sigma_{\rm SFH} ) are provided (see text for details). The colour scheme of two main panels are identical to that present in Figure 2 , while the colour bars shows the projected densities.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：使用FoF算法在模拟中识别出的20个随机选择的星团（左）和稠密气体云（右）的形态和空间分布。每个面板顶部标明了星团/云的质量。对于星团，还提供了其形成时间（t_form）和恒星形成历史的标准差（σ_SFH）（详见正文）。两个主面板的颜色方案与图2相同，而色标显示投影密度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The mass fraction of gas cloud and star cluster within different radii. The orange and blue histogram show the star formation rates within R vir R_{\rm vir} and 1 ​ k ​ p ​ c 1\rm kpc range, which is the same as the bottom panel of Figure 4 but in linear scale. The red and blue curves represent the mass fraction of star clusters and gas clouds in total stellar mass and gas mass (see definitions in text), respectively. The solid black curve represents the mass fraction of the star that within R vir R_{\rm vir} and formed in a FFB star cluster (also see definition in text). The solid and dashed curves correspond to the results within R vir R_{\rm vir} and the central 1 ​ k ​ p ​ c 1\rm kpc , respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：不同半径内气体云和星团的质量分数。橙色和蓝色直方图显示R_vir和1 kpc范围内的恒星形成率，与图4底部面板相同，但采用线性尺度。红色和蓝色曲线分别代表星团和气体云在总恒星质量和总气体质量中的质量分数（定义见正文）。黑色实线表示在R_vir内、且在FFB星团中形成的恒星的质量分数（定义亦见正文）。实线和虚线分别对应R_vir内和中心1 kpc内的结果。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Mass functions within the virial radius. Each panel displays the results at a specific redshift (from upper left to lower right: z = 8.0 , 9.1 , 10.5 , 12.7 z=8.0,\ 9.1,\ 10.5,\ 12.7 ). The black, blue, and red curves represent the mass function of star clusters, gas clouds, and young star clusters (defined as age < 5 ​ M ​ y ​ r \rm age<5Myr ), respectively. Shaded regions indicate Poisson errors in each mass bin. The gray dashed line shows the best fit (see Equation 6 ) to the star cluster mass function at z ∼ 8 z\sim 8 . The blue dashed lines indicate the best-fit slope ( α = − 1.05 \alpha=-1.05 ) derived from the gas cloud at z ∼ 8 z\sim 8 , with the normalization adjusted for each redshift.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：维里半径内的质量函数。每个面板显示特定红移下的结果（从左上到右下：z = 8.0, 9.1, 10.5, 12.7）。黑色、蓝色和红色曲线分别代表星团、气体云和年轻星团（定义为年龄<5 Myr）的质量函数。阴影区域表示每个质量区间的泊松误差。灰色虚线显示z~8时星团质量函数的最佳拟合（见公式6）。蓝色虚线表示从z~8的气体云推导出的最佳拟合斜率（α = -1.05），其归一化因子已针对每个红移进行了调整。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们分析了XMM-LSS和CDFS VIDEO场（面积约4.5平方度）中的星系团含量，这些区域预计将被即将开展的MOONRISE巡天部分覆盖。利用基于测光红移的星系团搜寻器AMICO和WaZP，我们构建了一个由两个搜寻器共同探测到的519个星系团候选体样本，红移范围z=0.1-3，其中包括74个z>1.5的探测结果。对于所有探测到的候选体，我们识别了最亮中心星系（BCG），并计算了概率性的星系团成员列表。我们的星系团测光红移测量结果与文献中可用的光谱红移吻合良好。基于辅助光谱数据，我们为116个星系团候选体（根据其光谱成员）和204个候选体（根据其可能的BCG）分配了z_spec测量值。我们还表明，包含射电亮成员的候选体能够被基于先验的星系团搜寻器PPM有效恢复。我们对这些候选体的星系含量进行了初步分析，重点关注其表观颜色-星等图中的红序成分。通过与星系演化模型比较，我们证明这一星族与高红移形成并被动演化的模型一致，并且在z=1.5-2.0时已经存在。最后，我们利用星系团样本评估了根据不同的MOONRISE策略，这些星系团将如何被探测和表征。我们表明，即使采用最浅的巡天策略，也能有效实现红移z~1.7以内的星系团光谱确认和表征。这为高红移星系团的物理性质以及致密环境中的星系形成提供了前所未有的洞察。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要总结：构建了可靠的高红移星系团样本，验证了测光红移方法的有效性，揭示了高红移星系团中红序星系的被动演化特征，并证明MOONRISE巡天策略在高红移星系团确认和物理性质研究方面具有巨大潜力。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用暗能量光谱仪（DESI）的多光纤光谱作为稀疏积分场光谱仪，对2291个红移z≤0.1的恒星形成星系进行了空间分辨化学丰度分析，这些星系的恒星质量跨越近四个数量级（8 ≤ log(M⋆/M⊙) ≤ 11.5）。在内部区域（<2Re），大质量星系的径向气体金属丰度轮廓呈现向外下降的趋势，梯度最陡处（∇log(O/H)）约为-0.08 dex/Re，而低质量矮星系则呈现近乎平坦的轮廓（∇log(O/H)~-0.02 dex/Re）。本研究探测到的大星系半径（约5 Re）揭示了盘-晕界面附近的平坦金属丰度轮廓。引人注目的是，这些平坦的金属丰度值在广泛的恒星质量范围内保持一致，可能反映了外部区域低恒星形成率和贫金属内流的影响。金属丰度梯度-恒星质量关系在log(M⋆/M⊙) ~ 10.5处出现转折，超过该点梯度变缓，这可能是由大质量星系内盘的化学平衡和/或宇宙气体吸积的稀释作用驱动的。在固定恒星质量下，观察到强烈的尺寸依赖性，其中致密星系比其延展对应物显示出更平坦的梯度和更高的中心富集。丰度梯度进一步与星系盘内的恒星年龄分布相关联，其中外部较年轻的星系比外部较老的星系显示出更陡的梯度，这与持续的由内向外盘生长维持中心集中化学富集相一致。这些结果强调了恒星形成效率、恒星反馈和贫金属气体吸积在控制星系径向化学结构中的相互作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，本研究利用DESI多纤维光谱数据，对2291个z≤0.1的恒星形成星系进行了空间分辨化学丰度分析，揭示了径向金属丰度梯度的质量依赖、内外盘差异、大小依赖以及恒星年龄分布关联等关键特征，表明恒星形成效率、反馈和贫金属气体吸积共同决定了星系的径向化学结构。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: A color composite, g , r , z g,r,z band DECaLS image, for few galaxies in our sample, centered on the target galaxy. The red circles indicate the positions of multiple DESI fibers placed on the galaxy. The circle sizes are illustrative and do not correspond to the actual DESI fiber diameter (i.e., 1.5 arcsec).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：我们样本中几个星系以目标星系为中心的彩色合成g、r、z波段DECaLS图像。红色圆圈表示放置在星系上的多个DESI光纤的位置。圆圈大小仅为示意，并不对应实际的DESI光纤直径（即1.5角秒）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Overview of the DESI DR1 star-forming galaxy sample used in this work. The distribution of galaxies is shown with filled contours, colour-coded by number density (counts). Left panel: Distribution of galaxies in the redshift–stellar mass ( M ⋆ M_{\star} ) plane. Middle panel: Mass–metallicity relation for the sample. The solid black line represents the median gas-phase metallicity in bins of stellar mass, and the shaded region denotes the 16th–84th percentile range at fixed mass. Right panel: Distribution of galaxies in the star formation rate (SFR)– M ⋆ M_{\star} plane. The red dashed line shows the star-forming main sequence from Renzini and Peng ( 2015 ) , with the shaded region indicating ± \pm 0.3 dex scatter.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：本工作中使用的DESI DR1恒星形成星系样本概览。星系分布以填充等高线显示，颜色编码表示数密度（计数）。左图：星系在红移-恒星质量（M⋆）平面上的分布。中图：样本的质量-金属丰度关系。黑色实线表示恒星质量分箱中的中值气体金属丰度，阴影区域表示固定质量下第16-84百分位范围。右图：星系在恒星形成率（SFR）-M⋆平面上的分布。红色虚线表示来自Renzini和Peng（2015）的恒星形成主序，阴影区域表示±0.3 dex的弥散。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Top panel: Multiplicity distribution of outer fibers per galaxy within the adopted matching criteria ( ≤ \leq 100 kpc and Δ ​ v ≤ 500 \Delta v\leq 500 km s -1 ), and after visual inspection. Bottom panel: Distribution of deprojected radial separations of outer fiber positions from the galaxy center, measured in bins of 5 kpc.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：上图：在采用的匹配标准（≤100 kpc且Δv≤500 km/s）内，并经目视检查后，每个星系外部光纤的多重性分布。下图：从星系中心到外部光纤位置的去投影径向间隔分布，以5 kpc为间隔测量。

Faint points represent individual fiber measurements. Top Right panel : Metallicity gradients (dex R e − 1 R_{\mathrm{e}}^{-1} ) as a function of stellar mass. Grey points show individual galaxies gradients (calculated within 0 < R e ≤ 2.0 0<R_{e}\leq 2.0 ), red circles denote median gradients in 0.5 dex stellar mass bins with their associated uncertainties, and the dashed line shows a linear fit to the binned medians for log(M ⋆ /M ⊙ \odot < < 10.5). The Pearson correlation coefficient ( r p r_{p} ) and the slope ( m m ) to the gradient - mass fit is written in lower left. Bottom Left panel: Same as in Top left but for nitrogen abundance profile, calculated using P10 calibrations. Bottom right panel: Same as in Top right but for nitrogen abundance gradients.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左上图：径向气体金属丰度轮廓，12+log(O/H)（基于O3N2的M13校准），作为归一化半径R/Re的函数，按恒星质量分箱。实线表示径向分箱中的中值金属丰度，阴影区域表示中值的不确定性（包括点的弥散，通过MAD测量，以及来自单个测量的蒙特卡洛误差）。淡色点表示单个光纤测量值。右上图：金属丰度梯度（dex Re⁻¹）作为恒星质量的函数。灰点表示单个星系的梯度（在0<Re≤2.0内计算），红色圆圈表示0.5 dex恒星质量分箱中的中值梯度及其相关不确定性，虚线表示对log(M⋆/M⊙ < 10.5)的分箱中值的线性拟合。皮尔逊相关系数（rp）和梯度-质量拟合的斜率（m）显示在左下角。左下图：与左上图相同，但针对氮丰度轮廓，使用P10校准。右下图：与右上图相同，但针对氮丰度梯度。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强透镜效应可使大质量黑洞双星产生多个具有不同放大率和到达时间的引力波像。LISA信号在频带内持续数月至数年，使得多个透镜像在旋进阶段重叠并产生拍频模式。采用奇异等温球透镜模型描述透镜配置，基于大质量黑洞双星信号构建双像拍频波形。为隔离拍频模式本身，波形失配仅在第一个像并合前的重叠旋进阶段进行评估，排除第二个像延迟并合峰的贡献。利用HS-nod-SN (B+20)强透镜族群，估算了可识别拍频事件的发生率，并使用拍频模板进行贝叶斯参数估计。当透镜时间延迟较短且延迟像具有较大放大率时，拍频模式最易识别。在196个可探测的双像透镜事件中，92个满足时间重叠条件，14个满足拍频识别标准，对应可识别拍频比例约为7%。后验推断表明，拍频模板可恢复代表性拍频事件的透镜时间延迟和放大率参数。这些结果表明，透镜拍频模式构成了LISA强透镜事件中一个可区分的子集，并为LISA频段的强透镜效应提供了独特的观测特征。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要总结：透镜拍频模式是LISA强透镜事件中一个可区分的子集，提供了强引力透镜在LISA频段的独特观测特征。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 磁场是宇宙的基本组成部分，影响着宇宙结构的形成和演化。虽然对本地星系团中的磁场已有研究，但其在高红移下的起源、放大和强度仍知之甚少。原星系团代表了星系团形成的早期阶段，是研究星系团内介质早期磁化的理想场所。我们报告了对红移z=1.72的CARLA J1510+5958原星系团的研究，使用JVLA在L波段（1-2 GHz）进行观测。我们旨在探究原星系团内介质中的磁场强度和结构，以及活动星系核在早期星系团形成过程中对环境的磁化作用。我们利用旋转测量综合法和QU拟合技术，分析了中心射电噪活动星系核偏振发射的法拉第旋转。我们进一步结合气体密度和湍流磁场的3D模拟来解读观测结果，并改变活动星系核的取向和路径长度。两个活动星系核瓣显示出不同的偏振特性。西瓣呈现均匀的旋转测量（平均值-115 ± 32 rad m⁻²，弥散度36 ± 11 rad m⁻²），表明存在局部有序的磁场，可能被瓣压缩，而东瓣则退偏振。尽管这种不对称性表明存在湍流、磁化的介质，但模拟排除了西瓣旋转测量分布为纯粹各向同性随机场的可能性。QU拟合进一步提示存在内部法拉第成分，解释为来自瓣的磁化相对论性等离子体与周围气体混合，表明活动星系核可能对周围介质进行了磁化。根据这种不对称性，我们将原星系团内介质的平均物理磁场下限约束为0.4 μG。这些结果证实了在z=1.72时存在磁化的原星系团内介质，证明了在星系团组装早期已有磁场放大过程。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：证实了z=1.72时原星系团内介质已存在磁场，证明在星系团形成早期已有磁场放大过程。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用盖亚DR3数据，在垂直高度z∈(-2,2)千秒差距和银心距R∈(8.5,14)千秒差距的范围内，推导了银河系的银盘面内和银盘面外旋转曲线v_c(R,z)以及垂直加速度a_z(R,z)，其中速度分量的测定精度较高（误差<5%）。相比之下，垂直加速度a_z(R,z)主要受模型依赖的系统性影响，不确定性高达约20%。这一精度水平使我们能够对银河系暗物质分布的几何形状施加严格约束，因为引力势的垂直梯度在此径向和垂直距离范围内（对应于银盘的特征尺度）达到最大。我们发现，包含观测到的恒星成分和球状暗物质晕的模型无法同时再现v_c(R,z)随高度的显著变化以及a_z(R,z)的观测行为。特别是，标度半径r_s~15千秒差距的球状晕对银盘内区的盘面外旋转曲线和垂直加速度贡献甚微，这些特征主要由恒星质量分布决定。相反，暗物质被限制在扁平盘状构型中的模型对v_c(R,z)和a_z(R,z)均有显著贡献，从而与数据吻合得更好。我们得出结论：盘状暗物质分布明显优于球状晕模型。即将发布的盖亚数据将能够对银河系暗物质成分的几何形状和分布进行更严格的检验。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：盘状暗物质分布强烈优于球状晕模型，银河系暗物质可能呈扁平盘状几何分布，未来Gaia数据发布将提供更强检验。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Comparison of weighted and unweighted mean azimuthal velocities ⟨ v ϕ ⟩ \langle v_{\phi}\rangle as a function of Galactocentric radius for four vertical slices in | z | |z| . Stars with small errors ( σ ​ ( v ϕ ) ∼ 1 \sigma(v_{\phi})\sim 1 –2 km s -1 ) tend to rotate faster ( v ϕ ∼ 250 v_{\phi}\sim 250 km s -1 ), while stars with larger errors ( σ ​ ( v ϕ ) ∼ 5 \sigma(v_{\phi})\sim 5 –7 km s -1 ) typically rotate more slowly ( v ϕ ∼ 220 v_{\phi}\sim 220 km s -1 ). Weighting by 1 / σ 2 1/\sigma^{2} therefore shifts the mean toward the kinematics of the low-error sub-population, introducing a systematic offset.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：加权平均与未加权平均方位角速度⟨v_φ⟩随银心半径的变化，针对四个|z|垂直切片。误差较小（σ(v_φ)~1–2 km/s）的恒星旋转较快（v_φ~250 km/s），而误差较大（σ(v_φ)~5–7 km/s）的恒星旋转较慢（v_φ~220 km/s）。因此，按1/σ²加权会使平均值偏向低误差子样本的运动学，引入系统性偏移。

Stars with small uncertainties , i.e. 0 < σ ​ ( v ϕ ) < 1 0<\sigma(v_{\phi})<1 km s -1 (blue distribution) show a peak is at v ϕ ≈ 250 v_{\phi}\approx 250 km s -1 whereas stars with larger uncertainties , i.e. 1.1 < σ ​ ( v ϕ ) < 7 1.1<\sigma(v_{\phi})<7 km s -1 (red distribution) show a peak is at v ϕ ≈ 200 v_{\phi}\approx 200 km s -1 .
