artifacts.abstract_zh: 后发星系团（Abell 1656；$z=0.023$）是一个邻近的富星系团，也是研究宇宙网中星系团形成的关键实验室。我们通过宽场（约12平方度）的Subaru/Hyper Suprime-Cam弱引力透镜分析，刻画了其投影暗物质分布及其与星系、星系团内介质和已报告的团内纤维结构的联系。我们重建了二维质量分布，拟合了Navarro-Frenk-White模型，推导了孔径质量密度轮廓，并将弱引力透镜信号与光学光谱、eROSITA X射线观测、射电数据和气体质量分数诊断进行了比较。单晕NFW拟合给出$M_{200\mathrm{c}}=8.2\pm0.7\times10^{14}~M_{\odot}$。孔径质量轮廓与最佳拟合NFW模型以及$R\gtrsim20'$（约560 kpc）处的X射线静力学质量一致，表明全局弱引力透镜质量受并合引起的偏差很小，而内部区域则显示出显著的静力学偏差。以NGC 4874和NGC 4839为中心的双晕NFW拟合给出的质量分别为$7.8\pm0.6$和$0.9\pm0.2\times10^{14}~M_{\odot}$，暗示着约1:8的次级并合。气体质量分数表明该系统正从首次远心点回归。我们发现弱引力透镜信号与X射线表面亮度之间存在正空间相关性，在团内纤维结构方向（$110^{\circ}$和$340^{\circ}$）最强，那里主要探测到剪切选择的子晕。后发星系团的$r$波段质光比在$R_{200\mathrm{c}}$内径向恒定，为$\langle M/L_r\rangle\simeq250\pm66~M_{\odot}/L_{\odot}$，而北部和西部的团内纤维结构显示出更高的值，约$1000~M_{\odot}/L_{\odot}$，表明暗物质主导性更强。这些结果表明，联合弱引力透镜与多波段分析能有效探测星系团并合过程和团内纤维结构中的暗物质分布。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：联合弱引力透镜与多波段分析能有效探测星系团并合过程和团内纤维结构中的暗物质分布，后发星系团正从首次远心点回归，内部存在显著流体静力学偏差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Color–magnitude diagram of the Coma cluster. Notable member galaxies NGC 4874, NGC 4889, and NGC 4839 are indicated by gold star, pentagon, and triangle, respectively. Green points mark the source galaxies used in the WL analysis in this study. Black points show detected objects in the field, with sources having FLUX_RADIUS < 3 <3 pix excluded for clarity. The red sequence is clearly visible, supported by the large number of spectroscopically identified member galaxies (e.g.; Jiménez-Teja et al. , 2025 ; Kang et al. , 2025 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：后发星系团的颜色-星等图。显著的成员星系NGC 4874、NGC 4889和NGC 4839分别用金色星形、五边形和三角形标示。绿点表示本研究中弱引力透镜分析所用的源星系。黑点表示视场中探测到的天体，为清晰起见，排除了FLUX_RADIUS < 3像素的源。红序清晰可见，并得到大量光谱证认的成员星系的支持（例如，Jiménez-Teja等人，2025；Kang等人，2025）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Two-dimensional mass distribution of the Coma cluster within a 2.8 Mpc-radius aperture centered on NGC 4874. The background is the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) map estimated using 1,000 realizations of the convergence ( κ \kappa ) map obtained by bootstrapping the source catalog. The gray contour starts from the 1 ​ σ 1\sigma level with 1 ​ σ 1\sigma step each. The open star, pentagon, and triangle shapes indicate NGC 4874, NGC 4889, and NGC 4839, respectively. The black arrows indicate the directions of ICFs reported in HyeongHan et al. ( 2024b ) . The inner and outer green dashed circles indicate R 500 ​ c R_{500c} and R 200 ​ c R_{200c} , respectively. The galaxy groups in the background are marked by filled circles with sizes linearly proportional to the number of members, and the photometric redshift is color coded. The size of the open circle in the lower right corner corresponds to a background group with N g ​ a ​ l = 45 N_{gal}=45 , which has the largest number of galaxies among the identified background groups. The red and blue crosses mark shear-selected subhalos with SNR ≥ 3 \mathrm{SNR}\geq 3 ( N = 13 N=13 ) and 2 < SNR < 3 2<\mathrm{SNR}<3 ( N = 44 N=44 ), respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：以NGC 4874为中心、半径2.8 Mpc孔径内后发星系团的二维质量分布。背景是通过对源星表进行自举法获得的收敛图（$\kappa$）的1000次实现估计的信噪比图。灰色等高线从$1\sigma$水平开始，步长为$1\sigma$。空心星形、五边形和三角形分别表示NGC 4874、NGC 4889和NGC 4839。黑色箭头表示HyeongHan等人（2024b）报告的团内纤维结构方向。内部和外部绿色虚线圆分别表示$R_{500\mathrm{c}}$和$R_{200\mathrm{c}}$。背景中的星系群用实心圆标记，其大小与成员数量成线性比例，光度红移用颜色编码。右下角的空心圆大小对应于一个背景群，其$N_{\mathrm{gal}}=45$，是已识别背景群中星系数量最多的。红色和蓝色十字分别标记信噪比$\geq 3$（$N=13$）和$2<\mathrm{SNR}<3$（$N=44$）的剪切选择子晕。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Central region of the Coma cluster. The background HSC pseudo-color composite image is overlaid with white WL SNR contours starting from 1 ​ σ 1\sigma with 1 ​ σ 1\sigma step each. Red crosses denote shear peaks with SNR > 3.5 \mathrm{SNR}>3.5 detected in § 4.1 , and the orange numbers give their peak significances. The centroid uncertainty of the convergence peak associated with NGC 4874 is roughly 3 ′ 3^{\prime} (84 kpc). The galaxy density peak, X-ray center, and SZ center are marked by the cyan diamond, green circle, and magenta plus, respectively. The locations of NGC 4874 and NGC 4889 are labeled. The scale bar corresponds to 200 kpc.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：后发星系团的中心区域。背景为HSC伪彩色合成图像，叠加了白色弱引力透镜信噪比等高线，从$1\sigma$水平开始，步长为$1\sigma$。红色十字表示在第4.1节中探测到的信噪比$>3.5$的剪切峰值，橙色数字给出了它们的峰值显著性。与NGC 4874相关的收敛峰的中心不确定性约为$3'$（84 kpc）。星系密度峰值、X射线中心和SZ中心分别用青色菱形、绿色圆圈和洋红色加号标记。标出了NGC 4874和NGC 4889的位置。比例尺对应200 kpc。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Mass distribution overlaid on multiwavelength observations within a radius of 2.8 Mpc centered at NGC 4874. The white contours represent the signal-to-noise ratio of the reconstructed mass that start from 1 ​ σ 1\sigma level with 1 ​ σ 1\sigma step each. Top left: The background is smoothed ( FWHM ∼ \sim 0 . ′ ​ 6 0\aas@@fstack{\prime}6 ) galaxy density map using spectroscopically confirmed member galaxies (Kang et al. , 2025 ) on a linear scale. It shows that galaxy overdensity is extended toward the direction of Abell 1367 where the western ICF is detected (HyeongHan et al. , 2024b ) . We note that the spectroscopic completeness near the south-eastern field is below 50%. The central brightest galaxies and NGC 4839 are marked with green arrows. Top right: Smoothed galaxy luminosity map on a logarithmic scale. The red crosses denote the > 2 ​ σ >2\sigma shear peaks that are detected in the projected mass map. Bottom left: Flat-fielded eROSITA X-ray surface brightness map (Churazov et al. , 2021 ) in log scale. It features a contact discontinuity and a secondary shock whose locations are marked by the green arrows. The first passage of the NGC 4839 group is believed to be responsible for generating the secondary shock and contact discontinuity (Lyskova et al. , 2019 ; Zhang et al. , 2021 ; Churazov et al. , 2021 , 2023 ) , while its ram-pressure stripped tail indicates ongoing infall. The shear peak ( 3.9 ​ σ 3.9\sigma ) is located at NGC 4839, leading the ram-pressure stripped tail of its group. Bottom right: The publicly available LOFAR DR2 continuum imaging (Shimwell et al. , 2022 ) in log scale. The green arrows indicate the locations of radio halo and relic (e.g., Brown and Rudnick, 2011 ; Bonafede et al. , 2022 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：以NGC 4874为中心、半径2.8 Mpc内多波段观测叠加的质量分布。白色等高线表示重建质量的信噪比，从$1\sigma$水平开始，步长为$1\sigma$。左上：背景是使用光谱证认的成员星系（Kang等人，2025）的平滑（FWHM约0.6'）星系密度图，采用线性尺度。它显示星系超密区域向Abell 1367方向延伸，那里探测到了西部团内纤维结构（HyeongHan等人，2024b）。我们注意到，东南场附近的光谱完备性低于50%。中心最亮星系和NGC 4839用绿色箭头标记。右上：对数尺度的平滑星系光度图。红色十字表示在投影质量图中探测到的$>2\sigma$剪切峰值。左下：对数尺度的平场eROSITA X射线表面亮度图（Churazov等人，2021）。其特征是接触间断和次级激波，其位置用绿色箭头标记。NGC 4839群被认为首次通过时产生了次级激波和接触间断（Lyskova等人，2019；Zhang等人，2021；Churazov等人，2021，2023），而其冲压剥离尾表明正在下落。剪切峰值（$3.9\sigma$）位于NGC 4839，领先于其群的冲压剥离尾。右下：对数尺度的公开LOFAR DR2连续谱成像（Shimwell等人，2022）。绿色箭头指示射电晕和遗迹的位置（例如，Brown and Rudnick, 2011；Bonafede等人，2022）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Comparison between the binned X-ray surface brightness (SB) and the binned weak-lensing (WL) signal, and their dependence on azimuthal direction. Left: Binned WL signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) as a function of binned X-ray surface brightness. Gray open circles denote bins with WL SNR < 0 <0 , while the colored symbols represent measurements from individual azimuthal sectors. The dashed gray line shows the best-fit relation obtained using all bins, whereas the solid red line shows the fit restricted to bins with WL SNR > 0 >0 . The corresponding Pearson correlation coefficients, r r , and p p -values are listed in the legend and suggest the mild correlation between the X-ray SB and WL signals. Each colored marker corresponds to different azimuthal bin shown in the right panel. Bins corresponding to the ICF directions marked in the right panel are highlighted with black edges. Right: Pearson correlation coefficient computed in azimuthal sectors with an opening angle of 10 ∘ 10^{\circ} . Coefficients estimated using more than three bins are shown. The horizontal dashed line marks the mean of the correlation coefficients. Black-outlined bars highlight sectors that are aligned with the direction of N–, SE–, and W–ICFs, which are showing relatively strong correlations.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：分箱的X射线表面亮度与分箱的弱引力透镜信号之间的比较，及其对方位角的依赖性。左：分箱的弱引力透镜信噪比作为分箱的X射线表面亮度的函数。灰色空心圆表示弱引力透镜信噪比$<0$的箱，而彩色符号表示来自各个方位扇区的测量值。灰色虚线显示使用所有箱获得的最佳拟合关系，而红色实线显示限制在弱引力透镜信噪比$>0$的箱的拟合。相应的Pearson相关系数$r$和$p$值列在图例中，表明X射线表面亮度和弱引力透镜信号之间存在轻微相关性。每个彩色标记对应右图所示的不同方位角箱。对应右图中标记的团内纤维结构方向的箱用黑色边缘突出显示。右：在开角为$10^{\circ}$的方位扇区内计算的Pearson相关系数。显示了使用三个以上箱估计的系数。水平虚线标记相关系数的平均值。黑色轮廓的条形突出显示了与北、东南和西团内纤维结构方向对齐的扇区，这些扇区显示出相对较强的相关性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Reduced shear profiles of the Coma cluster. Top: Tangential shear ( g + g_{+} ) radial profile. The red solid line is the best-fit single NFW profile ( χ 2 / d . o . f = 1.3 \chi^{2}/d.o.f=1.3 ) assuming the c c – M M relation (Ishiyama et al. , 2021 ) and the blue solid line indicates the best-fit result of the two-NFW-halo fitting ( χ 2 / d . o . f = 1.3 \chi^{2}/d.o.f=1.3 ) which is motivated by the presence of the NGC 4839 group. The green lines indicate the locations of NGC 4839, R 500 ​ c , R 200 ​ c R_{500c},R_{200c} and R v ​ i ​ r R_{vir} . The hatched region is excluded during the analysis. The error bars indicate a 1 ​ σ 1\sigma uncertainty that accounts for the shape, measurement, and the large-scale structure noises. Bottom: Cross shear ( g × g_{\times} ) radial profile. It is consistent with the null signal.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：后发星系团的约化剪切轮廓。上：切向剪切（$g_{+}$）径向轮廓。红色实线是假设$c$-$M$关系（Ishiyama等人，2021）的最佳拟合单NFW轮廓（$\chi^{2}/d.o.f=1.3$），蓝色实线表示双NFW晕拟合的最佳拟合结果（$\chi^{2}/d.o.f=1.3$），这是基于NGC 4839群的存在。绿色线表示NGC 4839、$R_{500\mathrm{c}}$、$R_{200\mathrm{c}}$和$R_{\mathrm{vir}}$的位置。阴影区域在分析中被排除。误差棒表示$1\sigma$不确定性，考虑了形状、测量和大尺度结构噪声。下：交叉剪切（$g_{\times}$）径向轮廓。与零信号一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Projected mass profile of the Coma cluster. Top: We compare the best-fit NFW mass (red) with the AMD profile (black). Shaded regions are 1 ​ σ 1\sigma statistical uncertainties. The hatched region is excluded when we estimate the parametric cluster mass. We adopted the X-ray derived gas (blue) and total (orange) mass from Mirakhor and Walker ( 2020 ) marked in crosses. There is no systematic difference between the best-fit NFW and non-parametric AMD mass profiles. Middle: Hydrostatic bias ( b b ) profile of the Coma cluster. It shows a significant bias at the central ( R ≲ 20 ′ R\lesssim 20^{\prime} ) region while the hydrostatic equilibrium is reached at the outskirts. M X M_{X} and M W ​ L M_{WL} denote the X-ray derived total mass and the AMD WL mass, respectively. Bottom: Gas mass fraction of the Coma cluster. The blue cross represents the gas mass fraction dividing the gas mass by the aperture mass. The gray shaded region is the universal baryon fraction adopted from Planck Collaboration et al. ( 2016b ) . The gas mass fraction at the cluster outskirts is consistent with the universal value.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：后发星系团的投影质量轮廓。上：我们将最佳拟合NFW质量（红色）与AMD轮廓（黑色）进行比较。阴影区域为$1\sigma$统计不确定性。阴影区域在估计参数化星系团质量时被排除。我们采用了Mirakhor和Walker（2020）的X射线推导的气体质量（蓝色）和总质量（橙色），用十字标记。最佳拟合NFW和非参数化AMD质量轮廓之间没有系统差异。中：后发星系团的静力学偏差（$b$）轮廓。它在中心区域（$R \lesssim 20'$）显示出显著偏差，而在外围达到静力学平衡。$M_{X}$和$M_{WL}$分别表示X射线推导的总质量和AMD弱引力透镜质量。下：后发星系团的气体质量分数。蓝色十字表示气体质量除以孔径质量得到的气体质量分数。灰色阴影区域是采用Planck Collaboration等人（2016b）的宇宙重子分数。星系团外围的气体质量分数与宇宙值一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Gas mass fraction profiles of galaxy groups from the TNG-Cluster cosmological zoom-in simulation (Nelson et al. , 2024 ) . The black solid lines indicate groups infalling for the first time at 1.1 Mpc separation. The red solid lines indicate galaxy groups at the location of the first apocenter. The circles and triangles represent the median value of the binned data with a 1 ​ σ 1\sigma statistical uncertainty. The gray horizontal line refers to the universal baryon fraction adopted from Planck Collaboration et al. ( 2016b ) . The stars represent the case of the NGC 4839 group using the gas (Sasaki et al. , 2016 ; Lyskova et al. , 2019 ) and dark matter mass within a truncation radius ( r t = 3.43 ′ ∼ 96 r_{t}=3.43^{\prime}\sim 96 kpc; blue) and 8 times the truncation radius (green), respectively. The observed gas mass fraction of the NGC 4839 group suggests that the group has already passed its first core passage.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：来自TNG-Cluster宇宙学放大模拟（Nelson等人，2024）的星系群的气体质量分数轮廓。黑色实线表示在1.1 Mpc分离距离处首次下落的群。红色实线表示位于首次远心点位置的星系群。圆圈和三角形表示分箱数据的中值，带有$1\sigma$统计不确定性。灰色水平线指采用Planck Collaboration等人（2016b）的宇宙重子分数。星形代表NGC 4839群的情况，使用了截断半径（$r_{t}=3.43' \sim 96$ kpc；蓝色）和8倍截断半径（绿色）内的气体质量（Sasaki等人，2016；Lyskova等人，2019）和暗物质质量。NGC 4839群观测到的气体质量分数表明该群已经通过了其首次核心穿越。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 第一代恒星由原始中性氢气形成。其中质量最大的恒星在诞生后几百万年内以超新星形式爆发，产生了第一批重元素，并在周围介质中留下了其起源的独特化学印记。然而，化学丰度研究迄今主要依赖发射线测量，这种测量是光度加权的，因此偏向于最近形成的恒星。本文分析了来自JWST-SPURS项目的三个紫外明亮星系（红移分别为7.8、8.6和9.3，对应大爆炸后6.5亿至5.2亿年）的近红外中分辨率光谱。吸收线探测到的金属线化学丰度模式暗示了极端贫金属气体，其金属丰度显著低于追踪中心恒星形成区的发射线所推断的值。此外，它们都表现出超太阳的[C/O]丰度，这一特征也印刻在更大样本的相似红移星系的平均光谱中。这些结果揭示了第一代第三星族超新星爆发的独特化学印记。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这些化学印记揭示了第一代Pop III超新星爆发的独特化学特征，证明了吸收线分析对于追溯早期宇宙化学演化的重要性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : JWST /NIRSpec medium-resolution rest-frame UV grating spectra of the three main galaxies. The SPURS 1D spectroscopy of the sources studied in this work at redshifts z = 9.3113 , 8.6817 , z=9.3113,\,8.6817, and 7.8784 7.8784 are shown in purple, with detections of strong low-ion metal absorption lines highlighted.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：三个主要星系的JWST/NIRSpec中分辨率静止系紫外光栅光谱。本研究中红移z=9.3113、8.6817和7.8784的源的SPURS一维光谱以紫色显示，并突出显示了强低电离金属吸收线的探测。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Spectroscopic properties and chemical abundances of the three SPURS galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：三个SPURS星系的光谱性质和化学丰度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Normalised 1D spectra of the main absorption components. The panels show zoom-ins on the primary low-ion absorption-line features Si ii λ ​ 1260 \lambda 1260 , C ii λ ​ λ ​ 1334 , 1335 \lambda\lambda 1334,1335 , O i λ ​ 1302 \lambda 1302 , Si ii λ ​ 1526 \lambda 1526 , or Al ii λ ​ 1670 \lambda 1670 detected in the spectra (purple) and corresponding best-fit models from VoigtFit (black).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：主要吸收成分的归一化一维光谱。各面板展示了光谱（紫色）中探测到的主要低电离吸收线特征（Si ii λ1260、C ii λλ1334,1335、O i λ1302、Si ii λ1526或Al ii λ1670）以及VoigtFit的最佳拟合模型（黑色）的放大视图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Evolution of the [C/O] abundance as a function of metallicity. The absorption-derived metallicities for the three main galaxies are represented by filled pink diamonds, showing super-solar [C/O] abundances. Average values from stacked spectra z > 8 z>8 are shown in purple, also with [C/O] abundances close to solar. We compare to literature data in grey, calculated similarly from absorption lines for quasar DLAs (diamonds) ( ? ), Milky Way halo (squares), and disc (crosses) stars ( ? ). The rest-UV and optical emission-derived metallicities for the three main galaxies are shown in pink empty markers, with comparison to JWST z > 5 z>5 literature galaxies in hollow black squares ( ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ? ). With the exception of GS-z12 and LAP1-B (super-solar [C/O]), the high- z z galaxies are all in line with the local trend. We show predicted abundances from Pop II and Pop III enriched galaxies at z = 7.5 − 9.5 z=7.5-9.5 from the NEFERTITI simulations as coloured scatter points and contours ( 90 % 90\% distribution). We separate by the majority enrichment source: Pop III faint and CCSNe (pink), Pop III high-energy SNe and hypernovae (yellow), Pop III PISNe (red), and Pop II SNe (blue). We compare to semi-analytical tracks from ( ? ) for expected yields from a top-heavy Pop III initial mass function (IMF, 30 − 120 ​ M ⊙ 30-120\,M_{\odot} ), and a top-heavy Pop II IMF including Wolf-Rayet stars, both predicting a carbon-enhancement at low metallicities.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：[C/O]丰度随金属丰度的演化。三个主要星系的吸收线导出金属丰度以填充的粉色菱形表示，显示出超太阳的[C/O]丰度。来自z>8叠加光谱的平均值以紫色显示，[C/O]丰度也接近太阳值。我们与文献数据（灰色）进行比较，这些数据类似地来自类星体DLA（菱形）、银河系晕（方形）和盘（十字）恒星的吸收线计算。三个主要星系的静止系紫外和光学发射线导出金属丰度以粉色空心标记显示，并与JWST z>5文献星系（空心黑色方形）进行比较。除GS-z12和LAP1-B（超太阳[C/O]）外，高红移星系均符合局部趋势。我们展示了来自NEFERTITI模拟的z=7.5-9.5的Pop II和Pop III富集星系的预测丰度，以彩色散点和等高线（90%分布）表示，并按主要富集源区分：Pop III微弱星和CCSNe（粉色）、Pop III高能超新星和超新星（黄色）、Pop III PISNe（红色）和Pop II超新星（蓝色）。我们与半解析轨迹进行比较，这些轨迹来自对顶部重型Pop III初始质量函数（IMF，30-120 M⊙）和包含沃尔夫-拉叶星的顶部重型Pop II IMF的预期产率，两者都预测了低金属丰度下的碳增强。

figures.caption_en: Fig. A1 : Example of rest-optical emission-line fitting. The JWST/NIRSpec 1D spectrum for A2744-ZD2 at z = 7.88 z=7.88 is shown in gray, with the most prominent nebular emission lines needed to calculate 12+log(O/H) using the ‘direct’ method highlighted, including [O ii ] λ ​ λ ​ 3726 , 29 \lambda\lambda 3726,29 , H γ \gamma , the temperature-sensitive auroral line [O iii ] λ ​ 4363 \lambda 4363 , H β \beta , and [O iii ] λ ​ λ ​ 4959 , 5007 \lambda\lambda 4959,5007 .
figures.caption_zh: 图A1：静止系光学发射线拟合示例。红移z=7.88的A2744-ZD2的JWST/NIRSpec一维光谱以灰色显示，突出显示了使用“直接”方法计算12+log(O/H)所需的最显著星云发射线，包括[O ii] λλ3726,29、H γ、温度敏感极紫外谱线[O iii] λ4363、H β和[O iii] λλ4959,5007。

figures.caption_en: Fig. A2 : Best-fit model of the Ly α \alpha damping wing profiles. The JWST/NIRSpec rest-frame UV spectra for the three main galaxies are shown in gray, with best fit model for the DLA and IGM fitting overplotted in purple. The right panels show the corner plots for the posterior distributions for the main parameters: column density N HI N_{\mathrm{HI}} , neutral IGM fraction x HI x_{\mathrm{HI}} , UV spectral slope β UV \beta_{\mathrm{UV}} , and Ly α \alpha flux f L ​ y ​ a f_{Lya} . The derived column density N HI N_{\mathrm{HI}} for Gz9p3 is highly dependent on the Ly α \alpha emission, with the model here showing the lower range of N HI N_{\mathrm{HI}} produced. See text for further details.
figures.caption_zh: 图A2：Lyα阻尼翼轮廓的最佳拟合模型。三个主要星系的JWST/NIRSpec静止系紫外光谱以灰色显示，DLA和IGM拟合的最佳模型以紫色叠加。右侧面板显示了主要参数的后验分布角图：柱密度N_HI、中性IGM分数x_HI、紫外光谱斜率β_UV和Lyα通量f_Lya。Gz9p3的导出柱密度N_HI高度依赖于Lyα发射，此处模型显示了N_HI的较低范围。详见正文。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : The derived column densities for the three main galaxies from VoigtFit . The values are in units of cm -2 , and the Fe ii column densities are reported as 3 ​ σ 3\sigma upper limits.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：来自VoigtFit的三个主要星系的导出柱密度。数值单位为cm^-2，Fe ii柱密度报告为3σ上限。

figures.caption_en: Fig. A3 : Weighted stacks of publicly available z > 8 z>8 JWST/NIRSpec G140M spectra . These stacks include data from JADES (PIDs: 1181, 1286, 1287, 3215, 1210), SPURS (9214), GO-4750, and GO-5943. The total stack is shown in black, with additional stacks for strong line emitters ( N = 4 N=4 ), strong DLAs/good continuum detections ( N = 8 N=8 ), and tentative or no clear features in the continuum ( N = 20 N=20 ). The location of potential low-ion absorption lines and selected emission lines are highlighted.
figures.caption_zh: 图A3：公开可用的z>8 JWST/NIRSpec G140M光谱的加权叠加。这些叠加包括来自JADES（PID: 1181, 1286, 1287, 3215, 1210）、SPURS（9214）、GO-4750和GO-5943的数据。总叠加以黑色显示，另外还有强线发射体（N=4）、强DLA/良好连续谱探测（N=8）以及连续谱中无或仅有暂定清晰特征（N=20）的叠加。突出显示了潜在低电离吸收线和选定发射线的位置。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 近期对$fσ_8$和弱引力透镜数据的分析表明，在$z\lesssim 1$的线性增长速率可能低于$Λ$CDM模型的预测。这激发了暗物质模型的构建，其中大尺度结构增长在晚期相对于$Λ$CDM模型减缓。我们构建了粒子模型，其中暗物质在晚期经历与暗辐射的拖曳效应，且该效应随时间增强，这与传统的暗物质-暗辐射相互作用（随宇宙膨胀而减弱）不同。关键要素是，与暗物质相互作用的辐射由暗物质衰变在晚期产生。一个明确的模型——相互作用衰变冷暗物质（iDCDM），在$Λ$CDM基础上增加了两个参数，同时保持背景、大爆炸核合成和原初宇宙微波背景不变。但它预测了线性增长速率$f(k,z)$的阶梯状抑制，这是DESI、Euclid和Rubin巡天的独特目标。与当前数据对比，iDCDM模型显示出对$Λ$CDM模型的适度偏好，主要由$fσ_8$驱动，$Δχ^2$在-2.7到-7.6之间，具体取决于拖曳随红移的假定标度以及中微子质量。决定性检验将来自即将开展的$k$和$z$分辨的增长测量。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：未来DESI、Euclid和Rubin等巡天的k和z分辨的增长测量将对iDCDM模型提供决定性检验。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: P ​ ( k ) / P Λ ​ CDM ​ ( k ) P(k)/P_{\Lambda\mathrm{CDM}}(k) at z = 0 z=0 for Γ s 0 / H 0 = 0.01 \Gamma_{s}^{0}/H_{0}=0.01 (blue), 0.02 0.02 (green), 0.05 0.05 (red), 0.1 0.1 (orange). All other parameters are held at the n Γ s = 2 n_{\Gamma_{s}}=2 best-fit in Table 2 . P Λ ​ CDM P_{\Lambda\mathrm{CDM}} is computed with the same parameters, but with Γ s = 0 \Gamma_{s}=0 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：在z=0时，对于Γs0/H0=0.01（蓝色）、0.02（绿色）、0.05（红色）、0.1（橙色）的P(k)/PΛCDM(k)。所有其他参数保持为表2中nΓs=2的最佳拟合值。PΛCDM使用相同参数计算，但Γs=0。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: P ​ ( k ) / P Λ ​ CDM ​ ( k ) P(k)/P_{\Lambda\mathrm{CDM}}(k) at z = 0 z=0 with n Γ s = 0 n_{\Gamma_{s}}=0 for log 10 ⁡ ( Γ d / Γ s ) = − 4 \log_{10}(\Gamma_{d}/\Gamma_{s})=-4 (blue), − 3 -3 (green), − 2 -2 (red), − 1 -1 (orange). All other parameters are held at the n Γ s = 0 n_{\Gamma_{s}}=0 best-fit in Table 2 . P Λ ​ CDM P_{\Lambda\mathrm{CDM}} is computed with the same parameters but with the drag turned off. Dashed vertical lines mark k d k_{\mathrm{d}} from Eq. ( 13 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在z=0时，nΓs=0且log10(Γd/Γs)=-4（蓝色）、-3（绿色）、-2（红色）、-1（橙色）的P(k)/PΛCDM(k)。所有其他参数保持为表2中nΓs=0的最佳拟合值。PΛCDM使用相同参数计算，但关闭拖曳效应。垂直虚线标记了方程(13)中的kd。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: f ​ ( k , z ) / f Λ ​ CDM ​ ( z ) f(k,z)/f_{\Lambda\mathrm{CDM}}(z) at the best-fit points for n Γ s = 2 n_{\Gamma_{s}}=2 (top) and n Γ s = 0 n_{\Gamma_{s}}=0 (bottom).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：在nΓs=2（上）和nΓs=0（下）的最佳拟合点处的f(k,z)/fΛCDM(z)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Profile likelihood scan comparing the standard f ​ σ 8 f\sigma_{8} likelihood (“standard”) to the velocity-window-corrected likelihood (“velcor”) as a function of log 10 ⁡ ( Γ d / Γ s ) \log_{10}(\Gamma_{d}/\Gamma_{s}) . The shaded region marks log 10 ⁡ ( Γ d / Γ s ) < − 2.5 \log_{10}(\Gamma_{d}/\Gamma_{s})<-2.5 , which we exclude as a prior boundary: for log 10 ⁡ ( Γ d / Γ s ) ≳ − 2.5 \log_{10}(\Gamma_{d}/\Gamma_{s})\gtrsim-2.5 the two likelihoods agree to within Δ ​ χ 2 < 1 \Delta\chi^{2}<1 , while for smaller values the definition of f ​ σ 8 f\sigma_{8} becomes model-dependent and the two diverge. Non-monotonicity at the Δ ​ χ 2 ≲ 1 \Delta\chi^{2}\lesssim 1 level reflects finite convergence of the Powell minimizer at each grid point.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：比较标准fσ8似然（“标准”）与速度窗口校正似然（“velcor”）作为log10(Γd/Γs)函数的轮廓似然扫描。阴影区域标记log10(Γd/Γs)<-2.5，我们将其排除为先验边界：对于log10(Γd/Γs)≳-2.5，两种似然在Δχ2<1内一致；而对于更小的值，fσ8的定义变得模型依赖，两者出现分歧。Δχ2≲1水平的非单调性反映了每个网格点上Powell最小化器的有限收敛性。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: f ​ σ 8 f\sigma_{8} data used in the growth rate likelihood. Measurements marked with an asterisk ( ∗ ) are derived from peculiar-velocity surveys; the remaining points are RSD measurements. Classification follows [ 2 ] .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：增长速率似然中使用的fσ8数据。标有星号（*）的测量来自特殊速度巡天；其余点为红移空间畸变测量。分类遵循文献[2]。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Best-fit parameters for Λ \Lambda CDM and the two iDCDM models from a fit to the seven-likelihood combination and assuming massless neutrinos. Note that the best-fit value for log 10 ⁡ ( Γ d / Γ s ) \log_{10}(\Gamma_{d}/\Gamma_{s}) lies at the prior boundary − 2.5 -2.5 in both iDCDM models.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：ΛCDM和两种iDCDM模型在七似然组合拟合下的最佳拟合参数，假设中微子无质量。注意，在两种iDCDM模型中，log10(Γd/Γs)的最佳拟合值均位于先验边界-2.5处。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 最近，从强透镜系统JVAS B1938+666的引力成像中推断出一个质量约为10^6太阳质量的天体，其内部区域异常致密，并被一个延展的包层所包围，这远远超出了冷暗物质（CDM）晕的预期。通过使用引力热流体模拟，我们展示了这种结构在自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）晕中自然形成，并演化至深度核心坍缩阶段，此时在延展的轮廓内部形成了一个次级致密核心。由此产生的密度结构与透镜天体的推断性质高度吻合。我们还证明，在存在中等质量黑洞的情况下，CDM也能再现类似的轮廓，但这需要一个早期形成的祖先，随后通过透镜星系的潮汐剥离损失了5个数量级的质量。这种情景是否能在现实宇宙学环境中实现，仍是一个悬而未决的问题。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：SIDM模型能自然解释JVAS B1938+666中的致密天体结构，而CDM替代方案面临严重的物理和宇宙学困难，该结果支持SIDM作为暗物质候选者的可能性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left panel : Density profiles at selected snapshots during the collapse phase (orange) for t = 0.21 ​ Gyr t=0.21\,{\rm Gyr} (dashed), 0.24 ​ Gyr 0.24\,{\rm Gyr} (solid), 0.26 ​ Gyr 0.26\,{\rm Gyr} (dotted), and 0.28 ​ Gyr 0.28\,{\rm Gyr} (dot-dashed), together with the truncated NFW profile (solid black). The concentration of the initial halo is c 200 = 50 c_{200}=50 . The inset shows the full evolution of the normalized central density, with circles marking the SIDM snapshots displayed in the main panel. Right panel : The corresponding projected cylindrical mass profile of the simulated SIDM halo at t = 0.24 ​ Gyr t=0.24\,{\rm Gyr} (orange), together with the “Pseudo-Jaffe+Point Mass” (PJ+PM) model for the perturber (red) Vegetti et al. ( 2026 ) , where the shaded band denotes the 1 ​ σ 1\sigma uncertainty. For comparison, another simulated SIDM halo at the snapshot t = 0.11 ​ Gyr t=0.11\,{\rm Gyr} is also shown (magenta); its initial concentration is c 200 = 80 c_{200}=80 . The unresolved region R < 10 ​ pc R<10\,\mathrm{pc} is shaded in gray.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：左图：坍缩阶段选定快照的密度轮廓（橙色），对应时间t=0.21 Gyr（虚线）、0.24 Gyr（实线）、0.26 Gyr（点线）和0.28 Gyr（点划线），以及截断的NFW轮廓（黑色实线）。初始晕的浓度为c200=50。插图示出了归一化中心密度的完整演化，圆圈标记了主图中显示的SIDM快照。右图：模拟SIDM晕在t=0.24 Gyr时的投影柱状质量轮廓（橙色），以及扰动体的“Pseudo-Jaffe+点质量”（PJ+PM）模型（红色）（Vegetti等人，2026），其中阴影带表示1σ不确定性。作为比较，还显示了另一个模拟SIDM晕在t=0.11 Gyr时的快照（品红色）；其初始浓度为c200=80。未分辨区域R<10 pc以灰色阴影表示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Left panel : Density profiles for the truncated CDM halo hosting a central black hole, shown with (solid blue) and without (dashed blue) the black hole-induced density spike, together with the initial NFW halo (solid black). Right panel : Projected cylindrical mass profile for the tidal remnant (truncated CDM halo+black hole+spike; solid blue), together with the PJ+PM model (red) Vegetti et al. ( 2026 ) , where the shaded band denotes the 1 ​ σ 1\sigma uncertainty. The unresolved region R < 10 ​ pc R<10\,{\rm pc} is shaded in gray.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：左图：包含中心黑洞的截断CDM晕的密度轮廓，分别显示有（蓝色实线）和没有（蓝色虚线）黑洞引起的密度尖峰，以及初始NFW晕（黑色实线）。右图：潮汐残余（截断CDM晕+黑洞+尖峰；蓝色实线）的投影柱状质量轮廓，以及PJ+PM模型（红色）（Vegetti等人，2026），其中阴影带表示1σ不确定性。未分辨区域R<10 pc以灰色阴影表示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Time evolution of the subhalo mass assuming circular orbits r sub = 25 r_{\rm\textup{sub}}=25 , 30 30 , 35 35 , and 40 ​ kpc 40\,{\rm kpc} from the center of the host galaxy. The horizontal dotted gray line denotes M sub = 2.1 × 10 6 ​ M ⊙ M_{\rm\textup{sub}}=2.1\times 10^{6}\,M_{\odot} which best matches the mass model of the perturber.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：假设子晕在距离宿主星系中心r_sub=25、30、35和40 kpc的圆形轨道上运行时，其质量的时间演化。水平灰色虚线表示M_sub=2.1×10^6 M⊙，这与扰动体的质量模型最佳匹配。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用JWST/NIRSpec对静止框架近紫外Fe II和Mg II吸收线以及静止框架光学Na D吸收线的观测，研究了红移z~3的典型恒星形成星系中低电离气体流如何依赖于星系内在性质和观测视角。本研究结合了LyC22、EXCELS和AURORA巡天的星系，分别包含176、197和315个具有Fe II、Mg II和Na D覆盖的星系。基于个体和复合光谱，我们发现外流速度与星系性质之间没有统计上显著的相关性。然而，检测到外流的星系倾向于具有更高的恒星质量、恒星形成率和恒星形成率面密度，表明这两个样本并非来自同一母体。最后，我们还发现Mg II发射线优先在具有较低恒星质量和消光A_V、较高比恒星形成率的星系中检测到，这与有利于共振散射线和电离连续谱辐射逃逸的条件一致。我们首次在z~3的恒星形成星系中提供了吸收线性质依赖于星系倾角的证据：更正面朝向的系统显示出更强的吸收和更高的外流速度，而内流气体在更侧向的星系中更频繁地被检测到。这些趋势与z<1的观测以及宇宙学模拟的预测一致，其中星系风垂直于星系盘面发射，而吸积主要沿盘面发生。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：研究结果与z<1的观测及宇宙学模拟预测一致，支持星系风垂直于星系盘面发射，而气体吸积主要沿盘面进行的理论图景。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 现代巡天项目如DESI和Euclid收集了数亿个星系的数据，用于绘制宇宙的大尺度结构，是确定宇宙学参数和检验新物理的关键。然而，这一目标受到星系-晕连接不确定性的限制：即观测到的星系与不可观测的底层物质场之间的联系，需考虑星系偏置和装配偏置等效应。这些效应在修正引力模型中尤其难以理解，而修正引力模型是解释加速膨胀的宇宙学常数的流行替代方案。我们利用最先进的修正引力流体动力学模拟生成的模拟发射线星系和亮红星系星表，在f(R)引力中匹配正在进行的第四代星系巡天的规格，来研究这一问题。尽管修正引力（尤其是变色龙屏蔽机制）与星系形成之间的相互作用在星系-晕连接中留下了复杂的印记，但一个简单的物理图像浮现出来：随着时间的推移，越来越大的晕中星系形成得到增强。我们确认，基本的星系-晕连接模型——仅由晕质量决定星系占据的晕占据分布——在忽略装配偏置时，在z≲1的ΛCDM模型中低估了星系成团强度10%–20%，并证明修正引力引入了进一步的复杂性。用适当选择的环境密度作为第二HOD变量扩展该模型，可将所有模型中z≲0.5的装配偏置效应降低至2%–3%。这为后续利用大尺度结构检验非标准宇宙学模型时最小化装配偏置影响的工作提供了一个有充分动机的起点。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：以环境密度作为第二HOD变量能有效降低装配偏置影响，为后续利用大尺度结构检验非标准宇宙学模型提供了良好起点。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The leftmost panel shows the median sSFR in bins of stellar mass for our GR simulation and for TNG300. The central and rightmost panels show the sSFR and stellar masses plotted for subhaloes in both our GR run and TNG300. Blue points show objects corresponding to cuts M ⋆ > 3 × 10 11 ​ M ⊙ M_{\star}>3\times 10^{11}\,\mathrm{M}_{\odot} and s ​ SFR > 10 − 9.5 ​ yr − 1 s\mathrm{SFR}>10^{-9.5}\,\mathrm{yr}^{-1} .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：最左侧面板显示了我们的GR模拟和TNG300中恒星质量分箱的中值比恒星形成率。中间和右侧面板显示了我们的GR模拟和TNG300中亚晕的比恒星形成率和恒星质量。蓝点表示满足M⋆ > 3×10¹¹ M⊙和sSFR > 10⁻⁹.⁵ yr⁻¹条件的对象。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Sample cuts for LRG and ELG samples for a selection of our catalogs. These cuts are for our Λ \Lambda CDM samples. We note that ELG samples contain a constant stellar mass cut of M ∗ = 2.5 × 10 10 ​ M ⊙ M_{\ast}=2.5\times 10^{10}\,\rm M_{\odot} .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：我们部分星表中LRG和ELG样本的样本截断。这些截断适用于我们的ΛCDM样本。我们注意到ELG样本包含一个恒定的恒星质量截断M∗ = 2.5×10¹⁰ M⊙。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: A demonstration of the effect of varying the different HOD parameters on the central ELG mean occupancy. The black curve corresponds to parameter values ( σ M , γ , Q , p max , log ⁡ M c ) = ( 0.2 , 2.0 , 30.0 , 0.11 , 12.0 ) (\sigma_{M},\gamma,Q,p_{\rm max},\log M_{c})=(0.2,2.0,30.0,0.11,12.0) , i.e., the lowest value in the range of variation of each parameter in this figure. The shaded regions show the space swept out by gradually increasing the value of each parameter over the range shown in the top right legend, with solid coloured curves designating the curve associated with the maximum value of the parameter.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：不同HOD参数对中心ELG平均占据率影响的演示。黑色曲线对应参数值(σ_M, γ, Q, p_max, log M_c) = (0.2, 2.0, 30.0, 0.11, 12.0)，即本图中每个参数变化范围的最低值。阴影区域显示逐渐增加每个参数值（范围如右上图例所示）所扫过的空间，实色曲线表示与参数最大值对应的曲线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Upper row: Mean occupations of ELG-hosting haloes as a function of M 200 , c M_{\rm 200,c} . Different line styles show the total, central and satellite occupations as indicated by the legend in the rightmost subpanel. The shaded region shows the standard error on the mean total occupation for GR, inflated by a factor of 5 5 to aid visibility. The smaller subpanels show the relative difference between each MG model and GR. Lower row: The same but for the LRG halo occupation. In all cases the galaxy number desity is n g = 0.001 ​ h 3 ​ Mpc − 3 n_{g}=0.001\,h^{3}\rm Mpc^{-3} , with decreasing redshift from left to right as indicated at the top-left corner of each ELG top subpanel. The line colours represent the gravity model; the same colour scheme will be used throughout this paper.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：上行：ELG宿主晕的平均占据率作为M₂₀₀,c的函数。不同线型表示总占据、中心占据和卫星占据，如最右侧子图图例所示。阴影区域表示GR平均总占据的标准误差，放大5倍以便观察。较小的子图显示每个MG模型与GR的相对差异。下行：LRG晕占据的相同内容。在所有情况下，星系数密度为n_g = 0.001 h³ Mpc⁻³，红移从左到右递减，如每个ELG顶部子图左上角所示。线条颜色代表引力模型；本文中颜色方案保持一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Best-fit ELG HOD parameters as a function of redshift. The HODs correspond to galaxy populations with a fixed number density of 0.001 ​ h 3 ​ Mpc − 3 0.001\,h^{3}\mathrm{Mpc}^{-3} . The solid curves show the best-fit parameters smoothed over redshift using Gaussian smoothing with σ = 1.5 \sigma=1.5\,\rm plotted points. The unsmoothed curves are shown underneath as faded curves of the same colour.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：最佳拟合ELG HOD参数随红移的变化。HOD对应固定数密度为0.001 h³ Mpc⁻³的星系群。实线显示使用σ=1.5个绘图点的高斯平滑在红移上平滑后的最佳拟合参数。下方以相同颜色的淡曲线显示未平滑的曲线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Best-fit LRG HOD parameters as a function of redshift. The HODs correspond to galaxy populations with a fixed number density of 0.001 ​ h 3 ​ Mpc − 3 0.001\,h^{3}\mathrm{Mpc}^{-3} . The solid curves show the best-fit parameters smoothed over redshift using Gaussian smoothing with σ = 1.5 \sigma=1.5 plotted points. The unsmoothed curves are shown underneath as faded curves of the same colour.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：最佳拟合LRG HOD参数随红移的变化。HOD对应固定数密度为0.001 h³ Mpc⁻³的星系群。实线显示使用σ=1.5个绘图点的高斯平滑在红移上平滑后的最佳拟合参数。下方以相同颜色的淡曲线显示未平滑的曲线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: HOD parameters for ELG samples at n g = 0.001 ​ h 3 ​ Mpc − 3 n_{\text{g}}=0.001\,h^{3}\mathrm{Mpc}^{-3} , divided into 4 subsamples corresponding to galaxies hosted by haloes in a particular quartile of environment density. Each row corresponds to one parameter, and each column corresponds to parameter values of one gravity model, with line styles indicating different quartiles of environment. To improve visibility, solid curves show the fitted parameters smoothed over redshift using a Gaussian smoothing kernel with σ = 1.5 ​ points \sigma=1.5\,\rm points , while faded curves underneath show the unsmoothed counterpart. Quartiles are labelled Q1-4 with Q1 (Q4) corresponding to the galaxies hosted by haloes in the least (most) dense environment.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：n_g = 0.001 h³ Mpc⁻³时ELG样本的HOD参数，分为4个子样本，对应由特定环境密度四分位数晕所宿主的星系。每行对应一个参数，每列对应一个引力模型的参数值，线型表示不同的环境四分位数。为便于观察，实线显示使用σ=1.5个点的高斯平滑核在红移上平滑后的拟合参数，下方淡曲线显示未平滑的对应值。四分位数标记为Q1-Q4，其中Q1（Q4）对应由最不（最）密集环境晕所宿主的星系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: HOD parameters for LRG samples at n g = 0.001 ​ h 3 ​ Mpc − 3 n_{\text{g}}=0.001\,h^{3}\mathrm{Mpc}^{-3} , divided into 4 subsamples corresponding to galaxies hosted by haloes in a particular quartile of environment density. Each row corresponds to one parameter, and each column corresponds to parameter values of one gravity model, with line styles indicating different quartiles of environment. To improve visibility, solid curves show the fitted parameters smoothed over redshift using a Gaussian smoothing kernel with σ = 1.5 ​ points \sigma=1.5\,\rm points , while faded curves underneath show the unsmoothed counterpart. Quartiles are labelled Q1-4 with Q1 (Q4) corresponding to the galaxies hosted by haloes in the least (most) dense environment.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：n_g = 0.001 h³ Mpc⁻³时LRG样本的HOD参数，分为4个子样本，对应由特定环境密度四分位数晕所宿主的星系。每行对应一个参数，每列对应一个引力模型的参数值，线型表示不同的环境四分位数。为便于观察，实线显示使用σ=1.5个点的高斯平滑核在红移上平滑后的拟合参数，下方淡曲线显示未平滑的对应值。四分位数标记为Q1-Q4，其中Q1（Q4）对应由最不（最）密集环境晕所宿主的星系。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 气相化学丰度是星系演化的关键可观测结果，与星系形成历史密切相关。气体金属丰度随恒星质量（$\mathrm{M_*}$）增加而上升，形成著名的质量-金属丰度关系（MZR）。MZR残差已被分别证明与恒星形成率（“基本”金属丰度关系）、气体质量和光学尺寸呈反相关，但尚无单一分析同时考虑所有趋势。因此，我们利用光学MaNGA积分场光谱、HI-MaNGA气体质量和MaNGA DynPop动力学质量，对这三个趋势进行了联合分析。我们估算了约1500个恒星形成星系的内区气体质量，发现这是除$\mathrm{M_*}$外预测气体金属丰度最重要的参数。我们在恒星金属丰度和气态N/O上获得了等效结果，表明当前内区气体质量与长期化学演化历史存在内在联系。我们显示更致密的星系具有更低的动力学质量，这对更深引力势能产生更高金属丰度的观点提出了挑战。我们发现内区气体质量与星系尺寸之间存在强相关性，这意味着短期流入波动不能解释MZR残差。通过化学演化模型，我们表明我们的结果可以用长期流入历史的差异来解释。致密星系更早的流入历史导致后期气体质量更低且气体储库下降更快，从而产生更高的金属丰度。因此，在固定恒星质量下，星系尺寸编码了暗物质晕组装历史、长期气体流入历史、当前气体储库和金属丰度之间的联系。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 在固定恒星质量下，星系尺寸编码了暗物质晕组装历史、长期气体流入历史、当前气体储量和金属丰度之间的联系，为理解星系化学演化提供了统一框架。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Star-forming sequence (SFS) for our star-forming galaxy samples. Blue points indicate galaxies in our main sample, while purple points indicate galaxies that are also within the M Dyn \mathrm{M_{Dyn}} subsample. In the histograms, blue bars indicate the main sample and the red bars the M Dyn \mathrm{M_{Dyn}} subsample. We also show galaxies without reliable HI masses with gray points and bars. The dashed line indicates where SFR reaches 1 dex below the star-forming sequence of Saintonge and Catinella ( 2022 ) , which we required our samples to be above.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：我们恒星形成星系样本的恒星形成序列（SFS）。蓝点表示主样本中的星系，紫点表示同时属于M_Dyn子样本的星系。直方图中，蓝色条表示主样本，红色条表示M_Dyn子样本。我们还用灰点和灰色条显示了没有可靠HI质量的星系。虚线表示SFR低于Saintonge和Catinella（2022）恒星形成序列1 dex的位置，我们要求样本位于该线上方。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Top: gas metallicity as a combined function of stellar mass ( M ∗ \mathrm{M_{*}} ) and half-light radius ( R e \mathrm{R_{e}} ), for the M Dyn \mathrm{M_{Dyn}} subsample with smoothing applied. We also show the direction of maximum metallicity increase (black arrow). Bottom: as above, but for M Dyn \mathrm{M_{Dyn}} . We find M Dyn \mathrm{M_{Dyn}} to rise with both increasing M ∗ \mathrm{M_{*}} and increasing R e \mathrm{R_{e}} . This suggests that Φ e \mathrm{\Phi_{e}} ( = M ∗ / R e \mathrm{=M_{*}/R_{e}} ) is not a good proxy for the gravitational potential depth, and that potential does not drive the tight Φ e \mathrm{\Phi_{e}} –metallicity relation.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：上图：气体金属丰度作为恒星质量（M_*）和半光半径（R_e）的联合函数，针对M_Dyn子样本并应用平滑处理。我们还显示了金属丰度最大增加方向（黑色箭头）。下图：同上，但针对M_Dyn。我们发现M_Dyn随M_*和R_e的增加而上升。这表明Φ_e（=M_*/R_e）不是引力势深度的良好代理，且势能并不驱动紧密的Φ_e-金属丰度关系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Top: global HI gas mass ( M HI \mathrm{M_{HI}} ) plotted as a combined function of stellar mass ( M ∗ \mathrm{M_{*}} ) and half-light radius ( R e \mathrm{R_{e}} ) with LOESS smoothing applied. We also show the direction of maximum M HI \mathrm{M_{HI}} increase (black arrow), computed using partial correlation coefficients. Middle: as above, but for the HI mass within galaxies’ 90% light radii ( M HI , in \mathrm{M_{HI,in}} ). We find M HI \mathrm{M_{HI}} to rise with both increasing M ∗ \mathrm{M_{*}} and increasing R e \mathrm{R_{e}} , consistent with Pan et al. ( 2021 ) , such that more extended galaxies possess greater gas mass at fixed stellar mass. M HI , in \mathrm{M_{HI,in}} instead varies almost entirely with R e \mathrm{R_{e}} , suggesting a close relationship between galaxies’ sizes and their available gas reservoirs. Bottom: M HI , in \mathrm{M_{HI,in}} vs R e \mathrm{R_{e}} colored by log ⁡ ( M mol / M ⊙ ) \mathrm{\log(M_{mol}/M_{\odot})} , with median errors shown in the top left and the spearman correlation ρ \mathrm{\rho} between M HI , in \mathrm{M_{HI,in}} and R e \mathrm{R_{e}} shown in the bottom right. A tight correlation is evident, with a residual anticorrelation emerging between R e \mathrm{R_{e}} and M mol \mathrm{M_{mol}} .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：上图：全局HI气体质量（M_HI）作为恒星质量（M_*）和半光半径（R_e）的联合函数，应用LOESS平滑处理。我们还显示了M_HI最大增加方向（黑色箭头），使用偏相关系数计算。中图：同上，但针对星系90%光半径内的HI质量（M_HI,in）。我们发现M_HI随M_*和R_e的增加而上升，与Pan等人（2021）一致，因此在固定恒星质量下，更延展的星系拥有更大的气体质量。M_HI,in几乎完全随R_e变化，表明星系尺寸与其可用气体储库之间存在密切关系。下图：M_HI,in与R_e的关系，按log(M_mol/M_⊙)着色，左上角显示中位误差，右下角显示M_HI,in与R_e之间的斯皮尔曼相关系数ρ。可见紧密的相关性，且R_e与M_mol之间出现残差反相关。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Spearman correlation coefficients ( ρ \rho ) between gas metallicity (O/H) and various parameters as indicated in the legend, with p \mathrm{p} representing an arbitrary power. We find M gas , in \mathrm{M_{gas,in}} to yield the highest ρ \rho peak and thus the strongest metallicity correlation, suggesting this parameter to be the most fundamentally connected to metallicity after the stellar mass.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：气体金属丰度（O/H）与图例中所示各种参数之间的斯皮尔曼相关系数（ρ），其中p表示任意幂。我们发现M_gas,in产生最高的ρ峰值，从而具有最强的金属丰度相关性，表明该参数在恒星质量之后与金属丰度最为根本相关。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: As in Figure 4 , but for N/O abundances (top) and light-weighted stellar metallicities (bottom). We find M gas , in \mathrm{M_{gas,in}} to produce the highest ρ \rho peaks and hence the strongest correlations in both cases. The maximum N/O correlations are higher than found for O/H, in agreement with Boardman et al. ( 2024a ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：与图4相同，但针对N/O丰度（上图）和光加权恒星金属丰度（下图）。我们发现M_gas,in在两种情况下均产生最高的ρ峰值，从而具有最强的相关性。N/O的最大相关性高于O/H，这与Boardman等人（2024a）一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Mass–metallicity relation colored by the three most constraining parameters after M ∗ according to our correlation coefficient analysis: M gas , in \mathrm{M_{gas,in}} (top), M HI , in \mathrm{M_{HI,in}} (middle) or R e \mathrm{R_{e}} (bottom), with LOESS smoothing applied in each case. The error bars show the median errors in stellar mass and metallicity, and the arrows show directions of maximum increase. We find R e \mathrm{R_{e}} to move across the mass-metallicity space in a near-identical way to the gas mass measures. This suggests the mass–size–metallicity relationship to be very closely linked to that between stellar mass, gas mass and metallicity.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：质量-金属丰度关系，根据我们的相关系数分析，按M_*之后三个最具约束力的参数着色：M_gas,in（上图）、M_HI,in（中图）或R_e（下图），每种情况均应用LOESS平滑处理。误差棒显示恒星质量和金属丰度的中位误差，箭头显示最大增加方向。我们发现R_e以几乎与气体质量测量相同的方式穿过质量-金属丰度空间。这表明质量-尺寸-金属丰度关系与恒星质量、气体质量和金属丰度之间的关系非常紧密。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Feature importances for determining gas metallicity from a random forest analysis, reported as means and standard deviations across 50 random forest realisations with importances normalised such that they sum to 1 . We find M gas , in 0.7 / M ∗ \mathrm{M_{gas,in}^{0.7}/M_{*}} to be by far the most informative parameter for determining the metallicity. Φ e \Phi_{e} holds little importance by comparison, despite the existence of a tight Φ e \Phi_{e} -metallicity relation.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：随机森林分析中确定气体金属丰度的特征重要性，报告为50次随机森林实现（重要性归一化后总和为1）的均值和标准差。我们发现M_gas,in^0.7/M_*是确定金属丰度信息量最大的参数。相比之下，Φ_e的重要性很低，尽管存在紧密的Φ_e-金属丰度关系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: M gas , in 0.7 / M ∗ \mathrm{M_{gas,in}^{0.7}/M_{*}} vs. Φ e \Phi_{e} , colored by gas metallicity with smoothing applied. We also show the direction of maximum increase, computed from partial correlation coefficients. We find the metallicity to vary almost entirely with M gas , in 0.7 / M ∗ \mathrm{M_{gas,in}^{0.7}/M_{*}} , explaining the low importance ascribed to Φ e \Phi_{e} by the random forest in Figure 7 .
figures.caption_zh: 图8：M_gas,in^0.7/M_*与Φ_e的关系，按气体金属丰度着色并应用平滑处理。我们还显示了最大增加方向，使用偏相关系数计算。我们发现金属丰度几乎完全随M_gas,in^0.7/M_*变化，这解释了图7中随机森林赋予Φ_e低重要性的原因。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 碳增强金属贫乏（CEMP；$\rm{[Fe/H]} \le -2.0$ 且 $\rm{[C/Fe]} \ge 0.7$）恒星保存了关于早期化学增丰、低质量恒星形成以及星系层级组装的信息。本研究汇编了一个包含1032颗恒星碳丰度的大规模文献样本，涵盖贫金属银河系晕（437颗恒星）、21个超暗矮星系（UFDs；102颗恒星）、7个经典矮椭球星系（254颗恒星）、3个吸积矮星系（90颗恒星）、小吸积恒星系统（SASS；77颗恒星）以及11个恒星流（72颗恒星）。我们确定了每个系统及类别中CEMP恒星的比例。总体而言，低质量UFDs在低金属丰度下具有高比例，而质量更大的经典矮星系则拥有相对较少的CEMP恒星。这一行为揭示了矮卫星星系种群中一个新的低金属丰度光度（$M_{\rm V}$）-CEMP比例关系。现存UFDs中的高CEMP比例表明其增丰过程由微弱超新星主导，因为更高的能量输入可能已抑制恒星产生。经典矮星系中的低CEMP比例则暗示其以原位形成为主，而非来自更小系统的组装。利用$\rm{[C/H]}$丰度，我们还探测了早期低质量恒星形成。八颗恒星位于或接近理论“禁区”，表明尘埃诱导冷却与精细结构线冷却共同促进了早期恒星形成。这些罕见的尘埃冷却恒星可能形成于未能存续的UFD类系统中。总体而言，贫金属银河系晕似乎由多个不同矮星系组装而成，其中CEMP晕星来自早期UFD类系统，而非CEMP晕星则来自后来形成经典矮星系的中间大小晕。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：超暗矮星系的高CEMP比例表明其增丰主要来自微弱超新星；经典矮星系的低CEMP比例表明其以原位形成为主而非来自更小系统的组装；银河系晕由多种矮星系组装而成，CEMP晕星来自早期超暗矮星系类系统，非CEMP晕星来自中等大小晕。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们描述了基于大量光谱数据和Subaru/Hyper Suprime-Cam (HSC)成像的两个富星系团A1767和A2065的光谱层析弱引力透镜测量（spectrotomography）。这些探测代表了首次使用基于存档Subaru/HSC成像的光谱层析技术。测量仅依赖于本文报告的光谱红移星系。该方法清晰地将团成员星系与背景星系分离，并抑制了使用测光背景红移可能引入的系统误差。我们以3.1σ（A1767）和3.5σ（A2065）的显著性探测到了层析剪切信号。剪切信号幅度与团动力学（caustic）质量一致，并随源红移适当缩放。然而，与基于DECam成像的A2029首次分光光度探测相比，在推导分析中使用的较亮背景星系的剪切信号时，揭示了一些微妙的潜在系统问题。这些问题对于理解未来基于更多Subaru成像以及Euclid和LSST数据的光谱层析技术的更广泛应用可能很重要。总共三次分光光度探测（A1767、A2029和A2065）为该技术更广泛地应用于无偏星系团弱引力透镜质量测定以及可能独立于其他方法的几何宇宙学检验奠定了基础。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：三项探测（A1767、A2029、A2065）证明了光谱层析技术的可行性，为未来基于Subaru、Euclid和LSST数据的更广泛应用奠定了基础，可用于无偏星系团弱引力透镜质量测定及独立几何宇宙学检验，但需注意较亮背景星系的系统效应。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 光学到近红外星际偏振，由定向排列的尘埃颗粒引起，通常遵循凸形的波长依赖性，即Serkowski关系。然而，紫外和中红外波段的观测表明，部分光谱不遵循这一关系。具体而言，约25%的光谱在中紫外波长（λ⁻¹ > 3 μm⁻¹）处表现出偏振度超出，称为超Serkowski偏振。本研究基于顺磁弛豫（DG定向）和辐射力矩（RAT定向）的联合效应，重新审视了Serkowski和超Serkowski光谱。我们利用HD 30614、HD 204827、HD 37903和HD 161056的观测数据约束模型，考察了两种辐射场：一种来自标度化的星际辐射场，另一种来自B型星。对于HD 30614和HD 204827的超Serkowski光谱，模型表明，由B型星在莱曼限（λ=912 Å）以下辐射增强的RAT定向可合理解释观测，且与DG定向结合能更好地拟合λ⁻¹ ≥ 5.5 μm⁻¹的数据。对于HD 37903和HD 161056的Serkowski光谱，仅在典型冷中性介质中、莱曼限以上的典型星际辐射场下，RAT定向本身即可解释观测光谱，而DG定向效率极低。因此，该模型预测从红外到远紫外的星光偏振光谱的能力，为未来紫外波段分光光度观测任务提供了有前景的分析工具。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该模型能够预测从红外到远紫外的星光偏振光谱，为未来紫外波段分光光度观测任务提供了有前景的分析工具。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : The locations of our selections of super-Serkowski polarisation spectrum (HD 37903 and HD 204827) and Serkowski polarisation spectrum (HD 30614 and HD 161056) within the WUPPE targets. The color of the symbols indicates the magnitude in the V-band towards these background stars. This figure is made with the permission from Anche et al. ( 2025 ) .

The alignment degree decreases with larger grain sizes; however, a stronger magnetic field can enhance the alignment for such large grains (orange lines). We use U = 1 U=1 for this plot.

figures.caption_zh: 表2：我们模型中的固定参数。我们通过改变a_max进行了一系列测试，但最佳值在0.5 μm附近略有分散。因此，我们固定该值以减少自由参数数量。

figures.caption_en: Table 3 : The derived parameters from our model to Serkowski and super-Serkowski spectra, according to the highest likelihood 3 3 3 - a ​ ( b ) = a × 10 b a(b)=a\times 10^{b} - The best value of U U is derived from the best fitting-parameter U scale U_{\rm scale} . - ∗ The physical reasons for choosing different gas density for HD 30614 and HD 204827 are given in the main text.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：根据最高似然度，从我们的模型推导出的Serkowski和超Serkowski光谱参数。a(b) = a × 10^b。U的最佳值由最佳拟合参数U_scale推导得出。*选择不同气体密度用于HD 30614和HD 204827的物理原因在正文中给出。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : The comparison between our model and the observed super-Serkowski spectra towards HD 30614 (left column) and HD 204827 (right column) with the conditions of the interstellar CNM, n H = 30 ​ cm − 3 n_{\rm H}=30\,\rm cm^{-3} , T gas = 100 T_{\rm gas}=100\, K, and the radiation field is scaled from the ISRF. The shaded area is from the top 500 models with the highest posterior probability shown by the solid magenta lines. Panel (a) : A combination of RAT alignment with a fixed a align = 0.05 ​ μ a_{\rm align}=0.05\,\mu m and the DG alignment. Panel (b) : Only the RAT alignment with varied a align a_{\rm align} . Panel (c) : A combination of the RAT ( a align a_{\rm align} is allowed to vary) and DG alignment. The error for the extinction curve is taken as 10% of the data. Our models with a joint effect of the RAT and DG alignments self-consistently reproduce the observed data for both super-Serkowski and the extinction curve. However, the radiation strength is extremely higher than the typical ISRF.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：在星际CNM条件（n_H = 30 cm⁻³，T_gas = 100 K，辐射场由ISRF标度）下，我们的模型与朝向HD 30614（左列）和HD 204827（右列）的观测超Serkowski光谱的比较。阴影区域来自后验概率最高的前500个模型，以品红色实线表示。面板(a)：RAT定向（固定a_align = 0.05 μm）与DG定向的组合。面板(b)：仅RAT定向（a_align可变）。面板(c)：RAT（a_align允许变化）与DG定向的组合。消光曲线的误差取数据的10%。我们的模型结合RAT和DG定向的联合效应，自洽地再现了超Serkowski光谱和消光曲线的观测数据。然而，辐射强度远高于典型ISRF。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : The polarisation spectrum and extinction curve towards super-Serkowski spectra in HD 30614 ( panel a ) and HD 204827 ( panel b ) with models accounting for the grain alignment by RATs and with a combination with the DG alignment for a typical condition of the interstellar super-bubble, n gas = 2 ​ cm − 3 n_{\rm gas}=2\,\rm cm^{-3} (HD 30614) and n H = 30 ​ cm − 3 n_{\rm H}=30\,\rm cm^{-3} (HD 204827) and T gas = 10000 T_{\rm gas}=10000\, K. The model nicely reproduces both curves, and these best models are almost identical. Yet, towards the highest wavenumber ( λ − 1 > 5.5 ​ μ ​ m − 1 \lambda^{-1}>5.5\,\rm\mu m^{-1} ) the contribution of the DG to the RAT alignment is slightly better accountable compared to the RAT alignment alone. However, because of no data, the best-fit model shows poor convergence towards the far-UV range.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：朝向HD 30614（面板a）和HD 204827（面板b）的超Serkowski光谱的偏振光谱和消光曲线，模型考虑了RAT定向以及DG定向的组合，条件为典型星际超泡环境：n_gas = 2 cm⁻³（HD 30614）和n_H = 30 cm⁻³（HD 204827），T_gas = 10000 K。模型很好地再现了两条曲线，且这些最佳模型几乎相同。然而，在最高波数（λ⁻¹ > 5.5 μm⁻¹）处，DG对RAT定向的贡献略优于单独RAT定向。但由于缺乏数据，最佳拟合模型在远紫外范围内收敛性较差。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 本章概述了活动星系核（AGN）的统一模型，重点介绍了吸积超大质量黑洞的物理结构、分类方案和演化过程。我们介绍了AGN的基本组成部分，包括超大质量黑洞、吸积盘、喷流、外流、宽线区和窄线区、极地尘埃以及各向异性尘埃遮蔽物。回顾了传统的基于取向的统一模型，重点关注遮蔽物质覆盖因子在塑造观测特性中的作用。我们介绍了辐射调节的统一模型，该模型考虑了辐射反馈对超大质量黑洞核环境的影响。我们还研究了AGN统一的演化方面，包括星系合并、宿主星系特性以及红移相关趋势的影响。最后，我们讨论了变脸AGN，它们通过表现出剧烈的光谱变化，对传统的统一框架提出了挑战。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，AGN统一模型需要从静态的几何取向框架拓展为包含辐射反馈和演化过程的动态统一图像，以更好地解释观测多样性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 从物质功率谱中提取原初暗物质相空间分布信息，是了解早期宇宙暗物质产生和性质的有效方法。几年前引入的一个简单经验公式成功再现了原初暗物质相空间分布的大部分显著特征——即使在这种分布是非热、多峰或具有其他复杂特征的情况下。延续这一研究方向，我们研究了机器学习技术能在多大程度上改进这种分析方法。有趣的是，我们发现一维卷积神经网络不仅能以更高的精度重建暗物质相空间分布，而且还能应用于更广泛的物质功率谱。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，机器学习技术能够有效提升从物质功率谱反推暗物质相空间分布的性能，为暗物质早期宇宙性质研究提供了新工具。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Sketch of the CNN architecture used in this work. Our initial input has two channels. One channel comprises M = 200 M=200 values of log ⁡ T 2 ​ ( k ) \log T^{2}({k}) . For different values of L L determined in part by the behavior of the T 2 ​ ( k ) T^{2}(k) distribution at large k k , the last M − L M-L values are truncated and forward-filled to simulate observing only part of the log ⁡ T 2 ​ ( k ) \log T^{2}({k}) curve. The other channel is a binary indication of which input values have been truncated. The exact value of L L is varied randomly during training. There are three internal convolution layers with tanh \tanh activation functions. The kernel for each has size ( N ch , K ) (N_{\rm ch},K) where K = 19 K=19 and where N ch N_{\rm ch} is the number of channels in the previous layer ( i.e. , two for the first hidden layer and 80 for the rest). The output of the third hidden convolution layer is residually combined with the output of the second. This is then squared to produce the final g ^ k ​ ( k ) \hat{g}_{k}(k) predictions. The loss function ℒ \mathcal{L} is evaluated over only non-truncated values — i.e. , using { g ^ ​ ( k 1 ) , g ^ ​ ( k 1 ) , … , g ^ ​ ( k L ) } \{\hat{g}(k_{1}),\hat{g}(k_{1}),\ldots,\hat{g}(k_{L})\} . In order to keep the dimension M M constant throughout, the edges are padded with replicated values.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：本工作中使用的CNN架构示意图。初始输入有两个通道。一个通道包含M=200个log T²(k)值。对于由T²(k)分布在大k处的行为部分决定的L的不同值，最后M-L个值被截断并前向填充，以模拟仅观察部分log T²(k)曲线。另一个通道是哪些输入值已被截断的二进制指示。L的具体值在训练过程中随机变化。有三个内部卷积层，使用tanh激活函数。每个卷积核的大小为(N_ch, K)，其中K=19，N_ch是前一层的通道数（即第一个隐藏层为2，其余为80）。第三个隐藏卷积层的输出与第二个隐藏卷积层的输出进行残差组合。然后将其平方以产生最终的ĝ_k(k)预测。损失函数ℒ仅对非截断值进行评估——即使用{ĝ(k₁), ĝ(k₁), …, ĝ(k_L)}。为了在整个过程中保持维度M恒定，边缘用复制值填充。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Reconstructing the dark-matter phase-space distribution g k ​ ( k ) g_{k}(k) for unimodal scenarios in which a 50 keV dark-matter candidate is produced via freeze-out (left panel) or freeze-in (right panel). In each case, the dark blue curve (occassionally hidden behind the magenta curve) represents the true g k ​ ( k ) g_{k}(k) distribution from which the corresponding transfer function (black curve) is generated using CLASS . The cyan and magenta curves then correspond to the reconstructed distribution functions obtained using the heuristic formula and the CNN, respectively. The quantity R R , as defined in Eq. ( 15 ), represents the improvement in the MSE that the CNN provides when comparing with the heuristic formula.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：在单峰情景下重建暗物质相空间分布g_k(k)，其中50 keV暗物质候选者通过冻结（左图）或冻结-入（右图）产生。在每种情况下，深蓝色曲线（有时隐藏在品红色曲线后面）代表真实的g_k(k)分布，相应的传递函数（黑色曲线）由CLASS根据该分布生成。青色和品红色曲线分别代表使用启发式公式和CNN获得的重建分布函数。量R，如公式(15)所定义，表示CNN与启发式公式相比在MSE上的改进。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Comparisons between the heuristic reconstruction in Eq. ( 8 ) and our new CNN-based reconstruction, evaluated for a variety of complex “test” cases drawn from Fig. 18 of Ref. Dienes et al. ( 2020 ) . In each panel, we show four curves. The first (blue) is our original dark-matter phase-space distribution which, for the sake of the test, may be regarded as the “true” distribution. We then use this distribution to generate, via CLASS , a corresponding transfer function (black). Given this transfer function, we then calculate two different attempted reconstructions of the original phase-space distribution: one obtained using the analytical heuristic formula (cyan), and another obtained through our CNN (magenta). We see that in all cases — including those with unimodal, bi-modal, and even tri-modal distributions, with peaks of assorted heights and widths — the heuristic formula (cyan) does extremely well in reproducing many of the critical features of the original phase-space distribution (blue) Dienes et al. ( 2020 ) . This alone is remarkable, given that the heuristic formula in Eq. ( 8 ) is a one-line analytical result. However, we now see that in all of these cases, our CNN can not only do it but do it better, with the CNN significantly outperforming the heuristic approach. This is especially meaningful, given that these different cases are all not only quantitatively but even qualitatively different than those on which the CNN was originally trained. Indeed, in each case we indicate the “MSE improvement factor” R R which quantifies how much better than the heuristic formula our CNN performs. The values of ω \omega in each case are discussed in Sect. V.2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：启发式重建（公式(8)）与基于CNN的新重建之间的比较，针对从参考文献Dienes等人(2020)的图18中提取的各种复杂“测试”案例进行评估。每个面板显示四条曲线。第一条（蓝色）是我们的原始暗物质相空间分布，出于测试目的，可视为“真实”分布。然后我们使用该分布通过CLASS生成相应的传递函数（黑色）。给定该传递函数，我们计算原始相空间分布的两种不同尝试重建：一种使用解析启发式公式（青色）获得，另一种通过我们的CNN（品红色）获得。我们看到，在所有情况下——包括具有单峰、双峰甚至三峰分布，且峰高和峰宽各异的情况——启发式公式（青色）在再现原始相空间分布（蓝色）的许多关键特征方面表现极好。仅凭这一点就非常了不起，因为公式(8)中的启发式公式是一个单行解析结果。然而，我们现在看到，在所有这些情况下，我们的CNN不仅能做到，而且做得更好，CNN显著优于启发式方法。这一点尤其有意义，因为这些不同的情况不仅在数量上，而且在质量上都与CNN最初训练的情况不同。事实上，在每种情况下，我们都标明了“MSE改进因子”R，它量化了我们的CNN比启发式公式好多少。每种情况下的ω值在第V.2节中讨论。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The effects of varying T 2 ​ ( k ) T^{2}(k) on the corresponding learned CNN solution for g ^ k ​ ( k ) \widehat{g}_{k}(k) for cases in which the true dark-matter phase-space distribution g k ​ ( k ) g_{k}(k) is unimodal (left panel) or bimodal (right panel). Within each panel we show an original CNN input log ⁡ T 2 ​ ( k ) \log T^{2}({k}) (black dashed line) as well as the corresponding CNN output g ^ k ​ ( k ) \hat{g}_{k}(k) (solid black line), while the “bands” surrounding these black lines respectively indicate small variations in the input log ⁡ T 2 ​ ( k ) \log T^{2}({k}) (yellow bands) and in the corresponding output g ^ k ​ ( k ) \hat{g}_{k}(k) (teal bands). We see that small relative changes in log ⁡ T 2 ​ ( k ) \log T^{2}({k}) lead to small relative changes in g ^ k ​ ( k ) \hat{g}_{k}(k) , thereby illustrating that the output of our CNN is qualitatively stable against small variations in its input.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：对于真实暗物质相空间分布g_k(k)为单峰（左图）或双峰（右图）的情况，改变T²(k)对相应学习的CNN解ĝ_k(k)的影响。在每个面板中，我们显示原始的CNN输入log T²(k)（黑色虚线）以及相应的CNN输出ĝ_k(k)（黑色实线），而围绕这些黑色线的“带”分别表示输入log T²(k)的微小变化（黄色带）和相应输出ĝ_k(k)的微小变化（青色带）。我们看到，log T²(k)的微小相对变化导致ĝ_k(k)的微小相对变化，从而说明我们的CNN输出对输入的小变化在定性上是稳定的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Our CNN reconstruction even performs extremely well in cases where the heuristic formula fears to tread. Shown in this figure is a case in which the original phase-space distribution (blue) leads to a transfer function (black) which violates one of the critical assumptions — namely the concave-down condition in Eq. ( 9 ) — required for the self-consistency of the heuristic formula. Indeed, the gray vertical band indicates the region in which this critical assumption is violated. The presence of such a region is why there is no result to show for the heuristic reconstruction. However, we see that our CNN has no problem handling cases that include such regions, and leads to a reconstruction (magenta) that continues to reproduce the underlying dark-matter phase-space distribution (blue) with incredible accuracy.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：即使在启发式公式不敢涉足的情况下，我们的CNN重建也表现得非常好。此图显示了一个案例，其中原始相空间分布（蓝色）导致传递函数（黑色）违反了启发式公式自洽所需的关键假设之一——即公式(9)中的下凹条件。事实上，灰色垂直带表示该关键假设被违反的区域。存在这样的区域就是为什么没有启发式重建结果可显示的原因。然而，我们看到，我们的CNN在处理包含此类区域的情况时没有问题，并且产生的重建（品红色）继续以令人难以置信的精度再现底层暗物质相空间分布（蓝色）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Upper panel: g ^ k ​ ( k ) \hat{g}_{k}(k) distributions (solid colored curves) reconstructed by the CNN from a T 2 ​ ( k ) T^{2}(k) function obtained from a bimodal g k ​ ( k ) g_{k}(k) distribution and then truncated above different choices of k cut k_{\rm cut} . The g ^ k ​ ( k ) \hat{g}_{k}(k) curves shown correspond to the choices k cut = 1 ​ h / Mpc k_{\rm cut}=1~h/{\rm Mpc} (red), k cut = 3 ​ h / Mpc k_{\rm cut}=3~h/{\rm Mpc} (green), k cut = 10 ​ h / Mpc k_{\rm cut}=10~h/{\rm Mpc} (blue), and k cut = 20 ​ h / Mpc k_{\rm cut}=20~h/{\rm Mpc} (purple) — wavenumbers indicated by the corresponding vertical dashed lines. The full T 2 ​ ( k ) T^{2}(k) function (solid black curve) and the g k ​ ( k ) g_{k}(k) distributions from which it was obtained (black dashed curve) are also shown. Lower panel: the corresponding residuals Δ ​ g ^ k ​ ( k ) ≡ g ^ k ​ ( k ) − g k ​ ( k ) \Delta\hat{g}_{k}(k)\equiv\hat{g}_{k}(k)-g_{k}(k) for each case. For k k well below k cut k_{\rm cut} , the CNN accurately reconstructs the true g k ​ ( k ) g_{k}(k) distribution despite the truncation. For k k near k cut k_{\rm cut} , edge effects lead to discrepancies in the reconstruction.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：上图：CNN从由双峰g_k(k)分布获得的T²(k)函数重建的ĝ_k(k)分布（实心彩色曲线），并在不同的k_cut选择之上截断。显示的ĝ_k(k)曲线对应于k_cut = 1 h/Mpc（红色）、k_cut = 3 h/Mpc（绿色）、k_cut = 10 h/Mpc（蓝色）和k_cut = 20 h/Mpc（紫色）——波数由相应的垂直虚线指示。还显示了完整的T²(k)函数（黑色实线）和从中获得它的g_k(k)分布（黑色虚线）。下图：每种情况下的相应残差Δĝ_k(k) ≡ ĝ_k(k) - g_k(k)。对于远低于k_cut的k，尽管有截断，CNN仍能准确重建真实的g_k(k)分布。对于接近k_cut的k，边缘效应导致重建中的差异。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 先前的Sirocco辐射传输模型预测了气体茧包裹的活动星系核（AGN）的低柱密度对应体，即“小红点”（LRDs）：致密、X射线弱、具有更蓝连续谱斜率以及巴尔末跳跃而非巴尔末断裂的源。最近发现的“小蓝点”（LBDs）群体与这一预测阶段高度相似。本文探索了这些低柱密度茧，其中星云复合发射仍可见，同时避免了强烈的巴尔末连续谱吸收。我们发现，柱密度递增序列连接了更经典的AGN谱、柱密度约为NH∼几×10^24 cm^{-2}的巴尔末跳跃LBD样谱，以及更高柱密度下的巴尔末断裂LRD样谱。在该序列中，电子散射产生指数型谱线翼，并在高柱密度特征（如强巴尔末吸收）出现之前抑制了X射线发射。因此，我们提出LBDs是共同气体茧包裹AGN序列中LRDs的低柱密度类似物。这一解释预测LBDs的特征包括：巴尔末跳跃发射、X射线弱、允许谱线呈指数翼、He II λ4686发射、比LRDs更小的Hα半峰全宽（FWHM）和等效宽度，以及弱或无明显吸收特征。我们将此与三个示例LBD谱进行比较，并在其中识别出巴尔末跳跃信号。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：LBDs是LRDs在共同气体茧包裹AGN序列中的低柱密度对应体。LBDs的特征包括：巴尔末跳跃发射、X射线弱、允许谱线呈指数翼、He II λ4686发射、比LRDs更小的Hα FWHM和等效宽度、弱或无明显吸收特征。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Sirocco model sequence in column density, varying only N H N_{\rm H} . Spectra are vertically offset for clarity. At low columns, N H ≲ 10 24 ​ cm − 2 N_{\rm H}\lesssim 10^{24}\,\mathrm{cm^{-2}} , the emergent spectrum remains close to the assumed incident SED. At intermediate columns, N H ∼ 10 24.5 ​ cm − 2 N_{\rm H}\sim 10^{24.5}\,\mathrm{cm^{-2}} , nebular Balmer-continuum emission produces LBD-like Balmer jumps. At higher columns, N H ∼ 10 25 ​ cm − 2 N_{\rm H}\sim 10^{25}\,\mathrm{cm^{-2}} , neutral absorption produces LRD-like Balmer breaks. The inset shows the corresponding H α \alpha profiles, demonstrating that exponential electron-scattering wings arise across both the LBD-like and LRD-like column regimes, and grow wider with increasing column density in this regime.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：Sirocco模型柱密度序列，仅改变NH。谱线垂直偏移以便清晰显示。在低柱密度（NH≲10^24 cm^{-2}）下，出射谱与假设的入射能谱分布（SED）接近。在中等柱密度（NH∼10^24.5 cm^{-2}）下，星云巴尔末连续谱发射产生类似LBD的巴尔末跳跃。在高柱密度（NH∼10^25 cm^{-2}）下，中性吸收产生类似LRD的巴尔末断裂。插图显示相应的Hα轮廓，表明指数型电子散射翼在LBD样和LRD样柱密度区间均出现，并在此区间随柱密度增加而变宽。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Comparison of a lower column density Sirocco model spectrum to a set of three LBD spectra: GS 3073, Nexus 5819, and Rubies 50052. Left: UV and optical spectra with strong permitted H and He line emission. Right: zoom-in on the Balmer-limit region, where the same model and observed continua of Nexus 5819 show a Balmer-jump-like deficit redward of the Balmer limit. The spectra are divided by a continuum fit blueward of the Balmer edge, F ν , lin F_{\nu,\rm lin} , to emphasize the continuum offset across H = ∞ 3645 {}_{\infty}\!=\!3645 Å. Within the wavelength-windows least affected by line emission in the model-space (highlighted with red), we show the mean observed flux-ratio with 1 1 , 5 5 and 10 ​ σ 10\sigma uncertainty indicated, showing that the observed flux ratios are significantly below unity, as expected for a Balmer-jump offset.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：低柱密度Sirocco模型谱与三个LBD谱（GS 3073、Nexus 5819和Rubies 50052）的比较。左图：紫外和光学谱，显示强的允许H和He线发射。右图：巴尔末极限区域的放大图，其中相同模型和Nexus 5819的观测连续谱在巴尔末极限红侧显示类似巴尔末跳跃的亏损。谱线除以巴尔末边缘蓝侧的连续谱拟合Fν,lin，以强调H∞=3645 Å处的连续谱偏移。在模型空间中受线发射影响最小的波长窗口内（以红色突出显示），我们展示了平均观测通量比及其1σ、5σ和10σ不确定性，表明观测通量比显著低于1，符合巴尔末跳跃偏移的预期。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Panchromatic comparison between a single Sirocco model and GS 3073 observational constraints (Übler et al. 2023 ) . Left : Emergent X-ray spectrum compared with the intrinsic narrow-line Seyfert 1–like input template, assuming k bol , X = 50 k_{\rm bol,X}=50 , and with the 7 Ms Chandra Deep Field constraint (Maiolino et al. 2025 ) . The Compton-thick cocoon suppresses the emergent X-ray luminosity below the observational limit. Centre : rest-frame UV–optical spectra, showing bound-free emission and strong recombination lines. Right : H α \alpha profile with broad symmetric exponential wings due to electron-scattering gas. The same electron-scattering column that suppresses the X-ray emission also broadens H α \alpha .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：单个Sirocco模型与GS 3073观测约束（Übler et al. 2023）的全色比较。左图：出射X射线谱与内在窄线赛弗特1型输入模板的比较，假设kbol,X=50，并与7 Ms钱德拉深场约束（Maiolino et al. 2025）对比。康普顿厚茧将出射X射线光度抑制在观测极限以下。中图：静止系紫外-光学谱，显示束缚-自由发射和强复合线。右图：Hα轮廓，具有由于电子散射气体产生的宽对称指数翼。抑制X射线发射的相同电子散射柱也展宽了Hα。
表1：连续谱归一化的巴尔末跳跃偏移测量。偏移显著性计算为(1−⟨Fν/Fν,lin⟩)/σ⟨Fν/Fν,lin⟩。对于单个波长窗口，平均值的标准偏差根据连续谱归一化通量值的离散度除以√N估算。组合值是每个目标两个窗口的逆方差加权平均值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Balmer break/jump strength versus N H N_{H} for various Sirocco density-sequences (solid curve is sequence shown in Fig. 1 ). Values below unity indicate a Balmer jump, while values above unity indicate a Balmer break. The colorbar highlights the cocoon density, n H n_{H} , at the inner boundary. Intermediate columns, N H ∈ ( 2 − 7 ) × 10 24 ​ cm − 2 N_{H}\in(2-7)\times 10^{24}{\rm cm^{-2}} , produce LBD-like Balmer jumps, whereas higher columns can produce LRD-like Balmer breaks.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：不同Sirocco密度序列的巴尔末断裂/跳跃强度与NH的关系（实线为图1所示序列）。值小于1表示巴尔末跳跃，值大于1表示巴尔末断裂。色标突出显示内边界处的茧密度nH。中等柱密度NH∈(2−7)×10^24 cm^{-2}产生类似LBD的巴尔末跳跃，而更高柱密度可产生类似LRD的巴尔末断裂。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Sirocco model spectra optical ( β opt \beta_{\rm opt} ) versus UV ( β UV \beta_{\rm UV} ) continuum spectral slopes. The slopes β UV \beta_{\rm UV} and β opt \beta_{\rm opt} are measured using the rest-frame continuum windows in Brazzini et al. ( 2026 ) (i.e., 2160–3100 Å for β UV \beta_{\rm UV} and 5360–6270 Å for β opt \beta_{\rm opt} , masking Mg ii , He i λ \lambda 5876). Circles and squares show two cocoon density-sequences starting at 10 16 ​ cm 10^{16}{\rm cm} and 10 17 ​ cm 10^{17}{\rm cm} , respectively. The dividing line highlights regions associated with LBDs and LRDs, where the predicted Balmer jump Sirocco models from Fig. 4 naturally inhabit this LBD color-space.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：Sirocco模型谱光学（βopt）与紫外（βUV）连续谱斜率。βUV和βopt使用Brazzini et al.（2026）的静止系连续谱窗口测量（即βUV为2160–3100 Å，βopt为5360–6270 Å，屏蔽Mg ii、He i λ5876）。圆圈和方块分别表示从10^16 cm和10^17 cm开始的两种茧密度序列。分界线突出显示了与LBDs和LRDs相关的区域，其中图4中预测的巴尔末跳跃Sirocco模型自然位于此LBD颜色空间。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 原恒星喷流是恒星反馈的最早形式之一，但其对中心聚集分子云中恒星形成和星团组装的影响仍知之甚少。我们利用Torch星团形成框架，研究了原恒星喷流如何影响恒星形成效率、恒星形成的时间变异性、星团结构以及中心聚集的新生星团的早期动力学状态。我们采用一个质量为M = 2.5 × 10^3太阳质量的中心聚集初始云模型，比较了六对有无原恒星喷流的模拟，并补充了一对更高分辨率的模拟。我们使用全局恒星形成诊断以及恒星种群的结构和动力学测量来分析模拟结果。具有喷流反馈的模型实现了12-16%的恒星形成效率，而相应的无喷流模型则产生了19-33%的更高效率。喷流还导致恒星形成以离散爆发而非连续方式进行，产生更延展和更次结构的恒星系统，并留下结合更松散、维里参数更高的恒星种群。在我们的中心聚集初始条件下，有喷流的模拟形成的恒星系统比无喷流的模拟更好地再现了年轻星团中观测到的投影结构参数Q_2D的范围，表明原恒星喷流即使在中心聚集的云中也是一个重要的早期反馈通道，它调节恒星形成效率并塑造新生星团的结构。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，原恒星喷流是重要的早期反馈通道，即使在中心聚集的云中也能调节恒星形成效率并塑造星团结构。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Initial centrally concentrated gas density profile used in our simulations, shown as the hydrogen number density n H ​ ( r ) n_{\mathrm{H}}(r) versus radius r r in parsecs. The profile is identical to the initial gas profile in Paper I (their Fig. 1), and we adopt the same (green) colour for direct visual comparison.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：模拟中使用的初始中心聚集气体密度分布，显示为氢数密度n_H(r)随半径r（以秒差距为单位）的变化。该分布与论文I（其图1）中的初始气体分布相同，我们采用相同的（绿色）颜色以便直接视觉比较。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Initial cloud and computational-domain properties for all models.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：所有模型的初始云和计算域属性。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Parameters of the protostellar jet module. 4 4 4 The parameter f mass f_{\rm mass} is the injected mass fraction in units of the stellar mass, while f vel f_{\rm vel} is the jet velocity fraction in units of the Keplerian velocity.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：原恒星喷流模块的参数。参数f_mass是以恒星质量为单位注入的质量分数，而f_vel是以开普勒速度为单位的喷流速度分数。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Summary of the simulation suite. 5 5 5 Name gives the simulation identifier; n n is the maximum AMR refinement level; Δ ​ x min \Delta x_{\rm min} is the minimum cell size; Jets indicates whether protostellar jet feedback is included; and Realization gives the label s s inherited from Paper I . The naming convention is nXsY-ZZZ , where X denotes the refinement level, Y denotes the realization label, and ZZZ is either JET or NoJ .
figures.caption_zh: 表3：模拟套件总结。Name给出模拟标识符；n是最大AMR细化级别；Δx_min是最小单元尺寸；Jets指示是否包含原恒星喷流反馈；Realization给出从论文I继承的标签s。命名约定为nXsY-ZZZ，其中X表示细化级别，Y表示实现标签，ZZZ为JET或NoJ。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Time evolution of the stellar structural diagnostics for the models with (JET; red curves) and without (NoJ; blue curves) jets. The left column shows the structural parameter Q 3 ​ D Q_{\mathrm{3D}} and the right column shows the stellar half-mass radius r h r_{\rm h} . The rows show, from top to bottom, the models n3s1 , n3s8 , n3s3 , n4s1 , n4s8 , n4s3 , and the additional higher-resolution check n5s8 . The horizontal dashed line in the left panels marks Q 3 ​ D = 0.7 Q_{\mathrm{3D}}=0.7 , the threshold below which clusters are more substructured and above which clusters are smoother and more centrally concentrated. Shaded segments in the Q 3 ​ D Q_{\mathrm{3D}} panels indicate epochs when the clustering analysis identifies more than one subcluster ( N cl > 1 N_{\rm cl}>1 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：有喷流（JET；红色曲线）和无喷流（NoJ；蓝色曲线）模型的恒星结构诊断的时间演化。左列显示结构参数Q_3D，右列显示恒星半质量半径r_h。行从上到下依次显示模型n3s1、n3s8、n3s3、n4s1、n4s8、n4s3以及额外的高分辨率检查n5s8。左图中的水平虚线标记Q_3D = 0.7，低于该阈值星团更具次结构，高于该阈值星团更平滑且更中心聚集。Q_3D图中的阴影段表示聚类分析识别出多个子星团（N_cl > 1）的时期。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Gas density slices in the x x – y y plane at t ≃ 3.5 t\simeq 3.5 Myr for the main n = 3 , 4 n=3,4 simulation suite. In each panel, the slice is centered on the z z -position of the stellar density peak. Black dots show all stars below 7 ​ M ⊙ 7\,M_{\odot} . Red circles indicate massive stars with M ⋆ ≥ 7 ​ M ⊙ M_{\star}\geq 7\,M_{\odot} , where the radius of each circle is proportional to the star’s mass. The dashed white circle marks the projected stellar half-mass radius r h r_{\rm h} in the x x – y y plane relative to the projected stellar center of mass. Cyan contours trace the boundary of the ionized gas. The model name is shown in the top-left corner of each panel, while the mass of the most massive star M max M_{\rm max} , the total stellar mass M ⋆ M_{\star} , the number of stars N ⋆ N_{\star} , and the half-mass radius r h r_{\rm h} are shown in the bottom-right corner. A white bar in the lower-left corner of each panel indicates a scale of 2 pc.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：主n=3,4模拟套件在t≃3.5 Myr时x-y平面的气体密度切片。在每个面板中，切片以恒星密度峰的z位置为中心。黑点显示所有质量低于7 M⊙的恒星。红圈表示质量M⋆≥7 M⊙的大质量恒星，每个圆的半径与恒星质量成正比。白色虚线圆标记相对于投影恒星质心的x-y平面内的投影恒星半质量半径r_h。青色等高线描绘电离气体的边界。模型名称显示在每个面板的左上角，而最大质量恒星的质量M_max、总恒星质量M⋆、恒星数量N⋆和半质量半径r_h显示在右下角。每个面板左下角的白色条表示2 pc的比例尺。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Gas density slices for two pairs of models with (JET) and without (NoJ) jets selected at epochs when the projected structural parameter Q 2 ​ D Q_{\mathrm{2D}} is nearly equal within each pair. The left column shows the n3s1 model pair at 2.08 2.08 Myr, and the right column shows the n4s3 pair at 1.38 1.38 Myr; the top row shows the NoJ models and the bottom row shows the JET models. The upper color bar shows the gas density, ρ \rho , in units of g ​ cm − 3 \mathrm{g\,cm^{-3}} . Black dots show all stellar particles, while red circles highlight massive stars with M ⋆ ≥ 7 ​ M ⊙ M_{\star}\geq 7\,M_{\odot} , with the marker size scaled by stellar mass. The model name is shown in the top-left corner of each panel, the simulation time is shown in the top-right corner, and Q 2 ​ D Q_{\mathrm{2D}} , Q 3 ​ D Q_{\mathrm{3D}} , and the projected half-mass radius r h r_{\rm h} are shown in the lower-right corner. A white bar in the lower-left corner indicates a scale of 2 pc.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：两对有喷流（JET）和无喷流（NoJ）模型的气体密度切片，选择在每对中投影结构参数Q_2D几乎相等的时期。左列显示n3s1模型对在2.08 Myr时，右列显示n4s3模型对在1.38 Myr时；顶行显示NoJ模型，底行显示JET模型。上色条显示气体密度ρ，单位为g cm⁻³。黑点显示所有恒星粒子，红圈突出显示质量M⋆≥7 M⊙的大质量恒星，标记大小按恒星质量缩放。模型名称显示在每个面板的左上角，模拟时间显示在右上角，Q_2D、Q_3D和投影半质量半径r_h显示在右下角。左下角的白色条表示2 pc的比例尺。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Evolution of the projected structural parameter Q 2 ​ D Q_{\mathrm{2D}} as a function of stellar age measured from the onset of star formation, t − t ⋆ t-t_{\star} . Thin red dashed and blue solid curves show the mean value of the three line-of-sight projections for individual runs with and without jets. The thick curves show the median evolution of each group of models. The shaded regions around the individual simulation tracks show the full minimum–maximum range of Q 2 ​ D Q_{\mathrm{2D}} values over the three projection axes. Observational data are included for comparison: green circles denote clustered SFiNCs systems, green squares denote the extended unclustered SFiNCs components (Getman et al., 2018 ) , and purple triangles show the young open-cluster sample from Dib et al. ( 2018 ) . For SFiNCs , horizontal and vertical error bars show the jackknife 1 ​ σ 1\sigma uncertainties in age and Q 2 ​ D Q_{\mathrm{2D}} , respectively. The black curve gives the unweighted binned median of the combined observational sample, computed from the central age and Q 2 ​ D Q_{\mathrm{2D}} values only; the observational uncertainties are shown for reference but are not used as weights in constructing this median. The legend gives the RMS value of the differences over time between the median simulation curves (with and without jets) and the observed median. The horizontal dashed line marks Q 2 ​ D = 0.8 Q_{\mathrm{2D}}=0.8 , below which projected stellar distributions are interpreted as more fractal or substructured.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：投影结构参数Q_2D随恒星年龄（从恒星形成开始测量，t−t⋆）的演化。细红色虚线和蓝色实线曲线分别显示有喷流和无喷流单个运行沿三个视线投影的平均值。粗曲线显示每组模型的中值演化。单个模拟轨迹周围的阴影区域显示三个投影轴上Q_2D值的完整最小-最大范围。包含观测数据以供比较：绿色圆圈表示成团的SFiNCs系统，绿色方块表示延展的非成团SFiNCs成分（Getman等人，2018），紫色三角形表示来自Dib等人（2018）的年轻疏散星团样本。对于SFiNCs，水平和垂直误差棒分别显示年龄和Q_2D的刀切法1σ不确定性。黑色曲线给出组合观测样本的未加权分箱中值，仅根据中心年龄和Q_2D值计算；观测不确定性仅供参考，但在构建此中值时未用作权重。图例给出了有喷流和无喷流模拟中值曲线与观测中值之间随时间差异的均方根值。水平虚线标记Q_2D = 0.8，低于该值投影恒星分布被解释为更分形或更具次结构。

artifacts.abstract_zh: ΛCDM宇宙学模型在解释许多天文观测方面取得了成功。然而，最近的观测越来越多地指向与标准ΛCDM框架的偏差。其中，最显著的差异之一是哈勃张力，它指的是从高红移测量和本地观测获得的哈勃常数H₀值之间的差异。为了解决这个问题，人们提出了许多宇宙学模型和方法论。本综述简要概述了解决哈勃张力的最新进展。暗能量光谱仪器（DESI）重子声学振荡（BAO）与未校准的Ia型超新星数据的结合，得出的H₀值显著高于基于早期宇宙探针的ΛCDM预测，即使没有纳入本地距离阶梯约束。这一结果表明，哈勃张力的根源在于低红移处的新物理学。我们的发现表明，尽管当前观测中存在许多未解决的系统误差，但它们不足以解释当前哈勃张力的幅度。这意味着可能存在尚未被发现的新物理机制。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，哈勃张力的根源可能在于低红移处存在尚未被发现的新物理机制，而非观测系统误差所能解释。这意味着需要超越标准ΛCDM模型的新物理学来解释这一现象。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Three-rung distance ladder. The lower-left panel depicts geometric distance measurements to Cepheid variables, which are used to calibrate their period–luminosity relationship. In the central panel, SNe Ia in host galaxies that also contain Cepheids are calibrated against these Cepheid-derived distances. Finally, the upper-right panel displays SNe Ia residing in the Hubble flow; once the calibration is established, those meeting the specified redshift criteria provide a direct determination of the Hubble constant. Figure adapted from Riess et al. ( 2022 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：三级距离阶梯。左下方面板描绘了对造父变星的几何距离测量，用于校准其周期-光度关系。在中央面板中，位于也包含造父变星的宿主星系中的Ia型超新星根据这些造父变星导出的距离进行校准。最后，右上方面板显示了位于哈勃流中的Ia型超新星；一旦校准建立，满足指定红移标准的超新星便直接确定哈勃常数。图改编自Riess等人（2022）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Conceptual overview of the Local Distance Network. The Hubble constant is ultimately measured by combining different distance measurement methods. A non-exhaustive list of baseline linkages is labeled on the right. Background rectangles in orange, light blue, and gray indicate the first, second, and third rungs, respectively. Figure is adapted from H0DN Collaboration et al. ( 2025 ) . For more detailed information, please refer to it. The references include SH0ES Riess et al. ( 2022 ) , CCHP Freedman et al. ( 2025 ) , EDD Anand et al. ( 2021 ) , Pop-II Anand et al. ( 2024 ) , MCP Pesce et al. ( 2020 ) , Pop-I de Jaeger et al. ( 2022 ) , CF4 Kourkchi et al. ( 2020 ) , DESI Said et al. ( 2025 ) , adh0cc Vogl et al. ( 2025 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：本地距离网络的概览。哈勃常数最终通过结合不同的距离测量方法来测量。右侧标出了非详尽的基线连接列表。橙色、浅蓝色和灰色的背景矩形分别表示第一、第二和第三级阶梯。图改编自H0DN Collaboration等人（2025）。更多详细信息请参阅原文。参考文献包括SH0ES Riess等人（2022）、CCHP Freedman等人（2025）、EDD Anand等人（2021）、Pop-II Anand等人（2024）、MCP Pesce等人（2020）、Pop-I de Jaeger等人（2022）、CF4 Kourkchi等人（2020）、DESI Said等人（2025）、adh0cc Vogl等人（2025）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Comparisons of H 0 H_{0} between HST Cepheids and other measures ( JWST Cepheids, JWST JAGB, and JWST NIR-TRGB) for SN Ia host subsamples. The data demonstrate that HST and JWST distance measurements are in good agreement, with the selection of different subsamples by teams (CCHP vs. SH0ES) accounting for the primary variations rather than instrumental systematics or differences in distances to galaxies in common. Figure adapted from Riess et al. (2024) Riess et al. ( 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：HST造父变星与其他测量（JWST造父变星、JWST JAGB和JWST NIR-TRGB）对Ia型超新星宿主子样本的H₀比较。数据显示，HST和JWST的距离测量结果高度一致，不同团队（CCHP与SH0ES）选择的子样本差异是主要变化来源，而非仪器系统误差或共同星系距离的差异。图改编自Riess等人（2024）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The impact on H 0 H_{0} of the various systematic uncertainties tabulated. The units of these measurements are km s -1 Mpc -1 . More details can be seen in Ref. Brout et al. ( 2022 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：列出的各种系统不确定性对H₀的影响。这些测量的单位是km s⁻¹ Mpc⁻¹。更多细节见参考文献Brout等人（2022）。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: H 0 H_{0} estimations derived from the gravitationally lensed quasars. More details can be seen in Ref. Hu and Wang ( 2023 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：从引力透镜类星体导出的H₀估计。更多细节见参考文献Hu和Wang（2023）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The best fit values with uncertainties for the SNe Ia absolute magnitude M B M_{B} and for H 0 H_{0} , derived from SNe within and beyond the transition distance D c D_{c} . More details can be seen in Ref. Perivolaropoulos and Skara ( 2022 ) .

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Fit of the flat Λ \Lambda CDM model with Ω m \Omega_{m} and H 0 H_{0} as free parameters. More details can be seen in Ref. Dainotti et al. ( 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：以Ω_m和H₀为自由参数的平坦ΛCDM模型的拟合。更多细节见参考文献Dainotti等人（2024）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The best-fit results for the binned data. The decline trend is 2.1 ​ σ 2.1\sigma significance. More details can be seen in Ref. Krishnan et al. ( 2020 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图7：分箱数据的最佳拟合结果。下降趋势具有2.1σ显著性。更多细节见参考文献Krishnan等人（2020）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 背景：活动星系核（AGN）喷流是星系演化的基本驱动力，将动能注入其周围环境。这些射电星系的大尺度形态和光谱特性是复杂粒子加速、能量损失和吸收过程的结果。虽然同步辐射谱的形状编码了等离子体的能量历史，但由于缺乏超低频（< 100 MHz）的高分辨率观测（该频段可追踪最古老的宇宙射线电子群），对粒子加速机制和活动周期的理解一直受到限制。目的：本研究旨在对明亮延展射电星系进行首次全面的多频分析，频率低至58 MHz。目标是研究电子加速机制，精确测量低频光谱形状，并利用光谱老化模型约束一组Fanaroff-Riley（FR）I型和II型星系的注入指数。方法：利用LOFAR低频天线（LBA）新的58 MHz观测数据，结合LOFAR高频天线（HBA；144 MHz）和快速ASKAP连续巡天（RACS，887 MHz、943.5 MHz和1367.5 MHz）数据，从3CRR星表中选取了22个延展源子样本，要求最大角尺寸至少为2.5角分。分析包括构建详细的光谱指数图，并利用射电颜色-颜色图解释光谱形状，约束射电瓣上的老化模型参数。结果：本研究展示了该样本的超低频光谱指数图。对于FR I星系，光谱指数从核心附近的约0.5（与一阶费米加速一致）变化到射电瓣中的大于1.0。对于FR II星系，热斑表现出陡峭的低频光谱（0.5-0.9），表明存在复杂的加速或吸收效应。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，多频成像有效约束了射电瓣中的注入指数与老化参数，为理解粒子加速机制和AGN活动周期提供了关键观测证据。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了来自ALESS巡天的三个红移约3的亚毫米选尘埃星系的ALMA高分辨率（约0.25角秒/2千秒差距）CO(5-4)和CO(4-3)观测。这些数据补充了现有的亚千秒差距尺度ALMA 870微米连续谱成像以及ALESS-JWST项目的JWST NIRCam和MIRI成像，使我们能够在相似的空间尺度上追踪分子气体、尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成和恒星种群。我们通过光谱确认其中两个源处于相同红移，并且可能正在相互作用。我们发现分子气体分布大致遵循870微米尘埃连续谱成像中看到的尘埃恒星形成结构，但气体储库比尘埃发射显著更延展，其空间范围与静止框架近红外恒星发射相当。通过对两个信噪比最高的源进行运动学建模，我们发现这些星系很好地符合旋转盘模型，具有较高的有序运动与随机运动之比（V_max/σ̄ = 5±1 和 6±1），尽管在当前灵敏度和空间分辨率下不能排除较小尺度的运动学偏差。最后，利用高分辨率870微米尘埃连续谱和CO数据，我们研究了这些高红移星系中千秒差距尺度的恒星形成标度关系。假设恒定的CO到H₂转换因子和激发比，我们发现数据偏离了不考虑湍流的理论恒星形成关系预测，但与引力湍流模型一致，从而表明湍流在高红移恒星形成调控中起着核心作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：湍流在高红移星系中调控恒星形成中起核心作用。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 准确测定星系内的尘埃消光对于推导关键物理性质（如恒星形成率）至关重要。我们利用GLASS-JWST ERS项目的JWST/NIRISS数据，分析并表征了红移1.0<z<2.4范围内星系在亚千秒差距尺度上的恒星和星云红化。通过多区域拟合方法，我们提取了99个单独星系（恒星质量范围7.0<log₁₀(M_*/M_⊙)<10.5）的高质量Hα和Hβ发射线图。未发现巴尔默减缩比（Hα/Hβ）低于Case B复合固有极限的证据，超出观测不确定度的预期变化。我们再现了巴尔默减缩比与总恒星质量的局域相关性，并按红移分割样本时未发现可测量的差异，在log₁₀(M_*/M_⊙)≲8.5以下消光可忽略。类似地，星云红化与连续谱红化的最佳拟合关系与局域星暴星系一致，E(B-V)_SED = (0.46±0.02)E(B-V)_neb，共同表明在z≲2.4范围内星系内尘埃几何无显著演化。我们推导了差分红化（星云-恒星）与SED导出的恒星形成率和恒星质量之间的最佳线性关系，发现两者均具有统计显著性。利用空间分辨测量，我们建立了分辨差分红化与恒星形成率面密度的经验校准。这将为更高红移（如未来Roman棱栅观测）中巴尔默线不可及情况下的空间分辨科学提供关键的尘埃消光校正。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要总结：在z≲2.4范围内星系内尘埃几何无显著演化，建立的空间分辨差分红化与SFR面密度经验校准可用于未来Roman等更高红移观测中巴尔默线不可及情况下的尘埃消光校正。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用JADES完整数据发布、Dark Horse和OASIS计划中的深场JWST/NIRSpec光谱，展示了红移z=1-10处恒星形成星系的气相金属丰度。我们叠加了约1500个中分辨率光谱，检测到[OIII]λ4363极光线下至12+log(O/H)=7.0，从而在金属丰度范围12+log(O/H)=7.0-8.7内推导出基于叠加的强线校准。在固定金属丰度下，我们的叠加显示出[OIII]λ5007/Hβ和[OIII]λ5007/[OII]λλ3726,3729的值通常低于基于高红移单个极光线发射体的校准，这表明在单个光谱中要求检测极光线时存在向更高激发态的观测偏差。基于我们的新校准，我们获得了z=1-10处的典型质量-金属丰度关系（MZR），发现从z~0到z~4-10金属丰度下降，而斜率没有显著变化。此外，我们识别出50个有希望的极贫金属星系（EMPG）候选体，其12+log(O/H)=6.7-7.3（1-4%太阳金属丰度），红移z=1.2-9.1。EMPG的MZR表现出较大的弥散，其中金属丰度较低的星系通常具有较低的sSFR，这与局域基本金属丰度关系的预期相反。这些结果支持涉及气体消耗/抛射和贫金属内流的随机恒星形成历史，强烈影响低质量星系的金属丰度。此外，我们在EMPG候选体中识别出两个小红点，两者均表现出宽的Hα和显著的Lyα，为极端贫金属环境中早期黑洞增长提供了见解。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：极贫金属星系的MZR具有大散射，低金属丰度对应更低的sSFR，与局域基本金属丰度关系预期相反，支持随机恒星形成历史（涉及气体消耗/抛射和贫金属内流）强烈影响低质量星系金属丰度的观点。
